news.Title: 「不配息0050」009816盤中反彈逾3%！成交量衝7萬張 分析師：等拉回布局再買
news.Content:
受台積電上漲帶動，「不配息0050」009816今（1）日盤中上漲逾3%，股價一度來到10.61元，成交量快速放大至7萬張，啟發投顧分析師丁彥鈞認為，長線趨勢不變，操作上宜採「等回檔再買」策略。

今日盤面表現，009816開盤10.56元，最高觸及10.61元，一度上漲3.81%，短短不到一小時成交量達7萬張，終止連續4日下跌走勢。

丁彥鈞表示，台股整體走強，加上台積電同步大漲，帶動相關ETF表現回升。短線反彈主要反映市場對國際局勢緩和的預期，但操作上仍建議「拉回再布局」，避免追高風險。

從基本面來看，丁彥鈞認為，009816成分股以台積電為核心，而台積電目前先進製程需求強勁，產業基本面穩健。

根據官方資料，009816前十大持股仍以台積電占比最高，達42.2%，其後依序為鴻海4.6%、日月光投控4.3%、聯發科3.6%、台達電3.3%，以及緯穎、聯電、台光電、奇鋐與國巨等電子權值股，整體持股結構高度集中於半導體與電子產業。

不過在操作策略上，丁彥鈞提醒，台積電股價波動多來自資金與消息面，含基相關ETF也會此影響，投資人不宜在大漲時追價。他建議，較理想的進場時機應落在市場明顯回檔時，「像前一日下跌時反而是較佳買點」，若短線出現急漲，應耐心等待下一波拉回再布局。

丁彥鈞認為，009816中長期仍具投資價值，特別是台積電權重較高的ETF仍值得關注，但操作上應掌握節奏，以「拉回布局」為原則，兼顧風險與報酬。

湯暖萱／財經特派記者，主跑主計處、營建、百貨紡織等

news.Title: 台積電及高含積量ETF補血復活，5檔高含積量ETF 3月受益人數飆歷史新高
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】3月台股飽受中東戰火衝擊，好壞股通通跌，不過，隨川普「二週停戰說」利多出鞘，帶旺台股護國神山台積電及高含積量ETF股價補血復甦，除股價飆升外，其中，更有5檔高含積量ETF 3月獲投資人超前部署、低接資金默默吃貨，激勵受益人數再攀歷史新高!根據集保統計，截至3/27止，持有台積電4成以上的台股高含積量ETF中，新光00904、元大0050、富邦0052、國泰00922與凱基009816共4檔，受益人數攀升至歷史新高，其中，受益人數最多的是元大0050，全台受益人高達約270萬人；為國人ETF最愛；績效方面，新光00904表現出線，今年來至3/31為止，累積含息報酬率達20.11%，超越台積電的13.92%，也大幅領先加權指數的9.53%，另外，富邦0052、元大0050、國泰00922等3檔，首季累積報酬率也贏過大盤，績效表現亮眼，吸引受益人數同步翻揚。

新光臺灣半導體30(00904)ETF經理人詹佳表示，台積電近期股價回落，不減未來兩三年基本面亮麗前景，加上又是台股政府護盤重心，預計隨美伊戰事劃下休止符後，未來股價仍有機會恢復基本面表現。更值得注意的是，當今全球AI需求熱潮持續火熱，帶旺最直接受惠的是全球半導體產業，正迎來新一輪漲價週期，表示半導體行業正從去庫存週期，轉向量價齊升的新階段，結構性的投資機會正在浮現。

詹佳預估，半導體繼存儲晶片價格攀升後，類比晶片、功率元件及晶圓代工也紛紛啟動漲價潮，表示半導體行業價格上行趨勢明確，次產業鏈的廠商獲利空間，將隨著漲價傳導效應逐漸展開，背後代表電子產業下游需求回暖，提供半導體整體庫存出清、供給端產能出現擴張，整體景氣熱度持續回升等基本面利多。

儘管最近Google新發布的AI記憶體壓縮技術TurboQuant出現，引發市場對未來儲存設備需求減少的擔憂，造成記憶體股價走跌，不過，從未來AI發展歷程來看，台股半導體供應鏈未來數年仍持續受惠AI基建升浪，在實體AI如自動駕駛、機器人等產業如火如荼發展後，看好未來高效能運算與邊緣AI裝置需求，也將同步進入成長爆發期台灣半導體產業鏈仍是全球AI先進技術的火車頭，扮演AI基建軍火庫的關鍵地位。

台新投信ETF投資團隊分析，中東地緣政治衝擊，屬市場短線利空因素，造成台股短線波動劇烈，但事後來看，都是提供投資人長線逢回加碼優質資產的布局良機，尤其是台股，自2023年進入AI時代以來，每遇地緣衝突事件，盤勢拉回期間從事後來看，多是投資買點，例如2023/10/11哈瑪斯攻擊以色列，攻擊發生後3個月，台股反彈5.5%，6個月後上漲25%；另外，2024/4/15伊朗攻擊以色列，攻擊發生3個月後，大盤反彈約18.1%，6個月後上漲16.2%，顯示全球地緣政治衝突事件，不影響全球AI大趨勢格局。

台新投信建議，過去台股逆市投資強調「富貴險中求」，隨台股ETF多元發展蔚為國人理財主流，投資人對於想全面掌握全球長期競爭力最強的台灣半導體產業，透過半導體ETF，可以完整布局整體產業鏈，多元納入上中下游關鍵重量級企業標的，同步囊括半導體各利基族群多元成長題材與股價輪漲效應。

news.Title: 【Yahoo早盤】台股狂噴1300點重返3萬3！分析師藍登耀：有望從頭漲到尾
news.Content:
中東戰火有望停火，美股四大指數走揚。台股今（1）日狂漲1300點、重返3萬3。永誠國際投顧分析師藍登耀表示，今日成交量能呈現溫和上漲，籌碼面有助於後續的續航，且今日上漲盤勢不會虎頭蛇尾，甚至有望延續到明日。

今日值班分析師：永誠國際投顧分析師藍登耀

台股在美伊戰火露出停戰曙光之下，狂噴1300點，重新站回3萬3。藍登耀表示，任何戰爭都有打完的一天，這次回檔下來雖然很重，但未來3萬5的高點還是有機會突破。

藍登耀也指出，今日的預估成交量落在7800億元以內，顯示今日台股是溫和上漲，籌碼面也相對乾淨，對後續的續航力也很有幫助。

藍登耀認為，接下來包含記憶體、載板等族群都還是有機會存在，尤其在報價上漲的助力下，後續機會都還是存在。

至於今日盤勢是否能紅到尾盤？藍登耀強調，今日的強勢格局應該是能從頭維持到尾，甚至明天都還有機會續漲，今日仍算是適當的介入點。

許如鎧／財經特派記者，主跑經濟部、電子電信、能源等

news.Title: 〈台股開盤〉川普要終戰撤軍了 台股噴漲逾1300點重返3萬3關卡
news.Content:
美國總統川普表示，「伊朗不必和美方達成停戰協議，美軍將在 2-3 周撤離」，伊朗總統也鬆口「願結束戰爭」，激勵美股四大指數全面強彈，台指期夜盤漲逾千點，激勵台股今 (1) 日響起反攻號角，早盤以 31892.33 點，最高更漲至 33012.41 點，大漲 1330 點，重返 33000 關卡，且同步收復 5 日線及季線，預估成交量 7200 億元。

電子權值股今天強勢走揚，台積電 (2330-TW) 早盤漲 80 元，以 1840 元開高，漲逾 4%，鴻海 (2317-TW) 也有約 4% 漲幅，聯發科 (2454-TW) 漲逾 1%。另外，台達電 (2308-TW)、日月光 (3711-TW) 皆大漲逾半根停板，廣達 (2382-TW) 漲逾 2%。

記憶體族群漲勢凌厲，旺宏 (2337-TW)、宇瞻 (8271-TW)、宜鼎 (5289-TW) 亮燈漲停，南亞科 (2408-TW)、華邦電 (2344-TW)、群聯 (8299-TW)、創見 (2451-TW)、力積電 (6770-TW)、威剛 (3260-TW)、十銓 (4967-TW) 漲逾半根停板。

ABF 載板三雄今天走揚，欣興 (3037-TW)、景碩 (3189-TW)、南電 (8046-TW) 皆漲逾半根停板。其他 PCB 類股部分，台燿 (6274-TW)、金像電 (2368-TW) 也都漲逾半根停板。

IC 設計族群表現亮眼，世芯 - KY(3661-TW) 一度觸及漲停，創意 (3443-TW) 漲逾半根停板，瑞昱 (2379-TW)、聯詠 (3034-TW) 漲逾 2%。

美股四大指數全數收紅，道瓊指數上漲 1125.37 點或 2.49%，收 46341.51 點；那斯達克指數上漲 795.99 點或 3.83%，收 21590.63 點；S&P 500 指數上漲 184.8 點或 2.91%，收 6528.52 點；費城半導體指數上漲 445.86 點或 6.24%，收 7588.2 點。

news.Title: 台積電漲85元「史上盤中第4強」 名師：不要樂觀就追高
news.Content:
中東戰爭又釋出明顯停火訊號，美股噴漲，台積電ADR上漲21.45美元，漲幅達6.78%，收在337.95美元。神山台北現股今天開盤不久，就漲85元至1845元，重返1800元關卡，漲點（85元）也創史上第四大。

回顧台積電（2330）史上前三大盤中漲點，均集中於年年第一季，顯示AI需求與地緣政治轉向對權王股價的強大推動力，第一名是1月5日，盤中大漲110 元，受惠於 市場對AI PC與次世代輝達（NVIDIA）晶片需求 抱持極高預期，加上外資對台積電先進製程產能利用率給出樂觀評估，點燃年初補漲行情，第二名落在3月11，盤中上漲 100 元，第三名3月5日，盤中上漲95元 。

隨著台積電今天上漲85元寫下史上盤中第四大漲點，市值也從45兆餘元成長到47.84兆元，一天增加逾2兆元。

資深台股分析師蔡明翰表示，中東戰火再度出現明顯停火，外加美股短線跌幅很深，帶動台股、台積電明顯走揚，但他個人覺得，投資人現在操作上，不要參考中東戰局的狀況，因為變化速度很快。

「還是一樣的做法，上揚的時候不要去追。」蔡明翰說，如果又出現利空就有可能大幅度回檔，沒有利空也會再震盪整理，「除非連續出現正向訊息，才有機會走高」，但現在有大幅度反彈機率很低，所以「不要一利空悲觀，一樂觀就往上追。」

news.Title: 台積電回檔1800！專家：「閉眼買」明年衝3字頭
news.Content:
財經中心／李筱舲報導

台積電（2330）股價日前衝上2000元歷史天價後，受地緣政治影響回檔至1800元以下，引發市場震盪。對此，「多頭總司令」前國泰投信董事長張錫強調公司基本面穩健，直言1800元以下是閉眼買的好時機。隨2奈米製程與AI長線需求噴發，預估今年獲利有望成長四成，股價上看2500元，明年更有機會挑戰3000元新高。

張錫分析指出，台積電股價雖因地緣政治從兩千高點回落，但公司核心競爭力並未受損。（圖／民視資料照）

從EPS 120元推算：台積電股價明年有望「3字頭」

根據《聯合報》報導，近期股價波動，張錫分析指出，台積電股價雖因地緣政治干擾從兩千元高點回落，但公司核心競爭力並未受損。若今年獲利成長能達到四成，目前1800元以下的價位實屬合理區間，甚至具備長線布局的吸引力。他進一步推算，若未來每股盈餘（EPS）有望達120至130元，若以本益比20至30倍計算，股價站上「3字頭」並非空談，預期今明兩年將分別挑戰2500元與3000元大關。

張錫認為台積電先進製程的能力，長線需求依然強勁。（圖／民視資料照）

2奈米量產在即，「護國神山」地位無可撼動

從產業面觀察，台積電憑藉先進製程領先優勢，「護國神山」地位短期內難以撼動。隨著2奈米製程邁向量產，將持續帶動半導體供應鏈發展，將穩居台股支柱。對於市場擔憂AI晶片架構轉向TPU (Tensor Processing Unit，張量處理單元) 或推論型晶片可能影響需求，但張錫認為無論技術如何演進，最終仍需依賴台積電的先進製造能力，長線需求依然強勁。他強調，AI市場仍處於成長初期，投資人應無視短期波動，採取中長線策略以掌握產業成長紅利。

news.Title: 台股早盤強彈1100點　台積電漲80元至1840元
news.Content:
首次上稿：04/01 09:17

更新時間：04/01 09:34（更新內文）

即時中心／顏一軒報導

美國總統川普（Donald J. Trump）表示，即使荷姆茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）基本上關閉，他也願意結束對中東的軍事行動。市場受到激勵，美股3月31日全數收漲；道瓊工業指數上漲1125.37點，漲幅2.49%，收在46,341.51點。台股今（1）日開盤上漲169.34點，開在31892.33點，成交金額為新台幣78.74億元，隨後強彈逾1152點，指數來到32875.76點。

台積電則開1840元，上漲80元；鴻海開195元，上漲7.5元；聯電開57.50元，上漲1元；聯發科開1550元，上漲60元；大立光開2215元，上漲60元。

標普500指數週二（31日）上漲184.80點，漲幅2.91%，收在6528.52點；那斯達克指數上漲795.99點，漲幅3.83%，收在21590.63點；台積電ADR上漲21美元，收在每股337美元，漲幅6.78%；輝達上漲9美元，收在174美元，漲幅5.62%。

news.Title: 台股反彈1374點！日月光大漲近9%領十大權值股迎修復行情
news.Content:
美伊戰事緊張情勢終露曙光，伊朗總統首度鬆口「願結束戰爭」，美國總統川普也暗示戰事可能不會持續太久，美四大指數終場全數收漲。台股今（1）日以31892.33點開出，盤中指數大漲1374.72點至33,097.71點，創下第4大盤中漲點。十大權值股齊揚，其中以日月光投控（3711）盤中大漲近9%最為強勁。

顧德投顧分析師何文高表示，今日台股屬於典型「利多放量上攻」格局，指數大漲逾千點，對多方而言是「漲越多越好」。昨日黑K高點約在32,453點，只要指數未跌破該位置，盤勢仍由多方主導，操作上可偏多思考，積極尋找標的布局。

截至上午10時，十大權值股同步走揚。以封測龍頭日月光投控（3711）表現最為強勢，盤中最高來到358元，上漲29.5元，盤中最大漲幅達8.98%，居十大權值股之冠；台達電（2308）盤中最高1,480元，較昨收1,380元大漲100元，漲幅達7.25%，漲勢居次。

何文高分析，隨著台積電先進製程訂單爆滿，部分封裝測試需求將外溢至日月光，加上雲端資料中心需求持續擴張，帶動長線訂單動能，股價具備續強條件。技術面上，若後續突破前高376元，將有機會展開新一波攻勢，建議投資人可把握360元以下區間布局。

台積電（2330）盤中最高觸及1,845元，上漲85元，盤中最大漲幅約4.83%；鴻海（2317）最高來到197元，上漲9.5元，漲幅約5.07%，表現同樣亮眼，且開盤1小時成交量近2萬張，交投熱絡。

何文高指出，台積電今日重新站上1,800元整數關卡，代表1月法說會後低點1,710元已成功守穩，後續有望延續多頭走勢。他認為，短線關鍵壓力區落在1,860元，一旦有效突破，將進一步確認轉多訊號，建議投資人可提早卡位，「越早布局越有利」。

至於鴻海，何文高認為，股價經歷長達一個月修正，自253.5元高點回落至昨日低點187.5元，已有明顯「超跌」現象，隨著AI伺服器與資料中心需求持續成長，鴻海作為主要組裝廠仍具基本面支撐。他指出，目前200元以下已浮現支撐力道，建議投資人可逢低布局，等待後續反彈行情。

聯發科（2454）盤中最高1,550元，上漲60元，漲幅約4.03%；廣達（2382）盤中最高287.5元，盤中最大漲幅達3.23%。

其餘權值股方面，中信金（2891）盤中最高52.8元，盤中最大漲幅約2.92%；富邦金（2881）盤中最高87.7元，漲幅約1.98%；國泰金（2882）盤中最高71.6元，漲幅約1.85%。中華電（2412）盤中最高134.5元，盤中最大漲幅約1.13%。

馮萱榕／財經特派記者，主跑財政部、電腦通路、觀光餐飲等

news.Title: 台股反彈1326點！日月光大漲8%領十大權值股迎修復行情
news.Content:
美伊戰事緊張情勢終露曙光，伊朗總統首度鬆口「願結束戰爭」，美國總統川普也暗示戰事可能不會持續太久，美四大指數終場全數收漲。台股今（1）日以31892.33點開出，盤中指數大漲1326.55點至33,049.54點，創下第4大盤中漲點。十大權值股齊揚，其中以日月光投控（3711）盤中大漲逾8%最為強勁，鴻海（2317）以開盤20分鐘超過1.4萬張成交量奪第一。

台股今日早盤在權值股全面反攻帶動下走揚，截至上午9時20分，十大權值股同步上漲。以日月光投控（3711）盤中上漲27.5元、漲幅達8.37%，漲勢最為凌厲。

IC設計龍頭聯發科（2454）同步強彈，盤中最高達1,475元，較昨收1,380元上漲95元，盤中最大漲幅達6.88%，居第二；鴻海（2317）最高來到197元，最大漲幅5.07%。

台積電（2330）盤中最高觸及1,845元，較昨收1,760元上漲85元，盤中最大漲幅4.83%，權王穩盤效果明顯。

大立光（3008）盤中最高來到1,550元，上漲60元，盤中最大漲幅達4.03%；廣達（2382）最高觸及287.5元，漲幅約3.23%。

金融權值股漲勢相對穩健，中信金（2891）盤中最高52.8元，漲幅達2.92%；富邦金（2881）和國泰金（2882）最大漲幅分別為1.86%和1.85%。

電信權值股中華電（2412）盤中觸及134.5元，較昨收133元上漲1.5元，盤中最大漲幅1.13%。

馮萱榕／財經特派記者，主跑財政部、電腦通路、觀光餐飲等

news.Title: SEMI論壇解析矽光子量產關鍵，台積電積光電異質整合堆疊今年量產
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】SEMI國際半導體產業協會，透過旗下SEMI矽光子產業聯盟（SEMI Silicon Photonics Industry Alliance, SiPhIA）舉辦「矽光子量產革命：AI數據中心的光學未來」論壇，全面解析矽光子走向量產的兩大核心門檻與當前解方。光電封裝的精度控制與光學互連的整合能力，是矽光子從技術驗證走向量產的首要挑戰。台積電(2330)COUPE平台的電子積體電路與光子積體電路進行異質整合堆疊，預計按計劃將於今年進入量產階段。隨著AI算力需求持續爆發，資料中心對高速光互連架構的需求急遽攀升。根據預測，光收發器是資料中心數據傳輸的核心元件，2026年來自矽光子模組的銷售佔比將超過五成，相較2024年的33%大幅躍升。

SEMI全球行銷長暨台灣區總裁曹世綸表示：「2026年是矽光子技術走向規模化部署的關鍵元年，突破光互連技術的量產瓶頸已成為產業當前最迫切的課題。這正是SEMI號召成立SiPhIA的初衷，目的是協助產業將矽光子從技術驗證推進至規模化商轉。」本次論壇匯聚台積電、工研院、Coherent、聯鈞光電(3450)、住友電工、愛德萬測試等產業鏈關鍵企業共同，針對光電封裝精度與測試基礎架構兩道核心門檻共同探討。

光電封裝的精度控制與光學互連的整合能力，是矽光子從技術驗證走向量產的首要挑戰。本次論壇匯聚光電封裝技術鏈的關鍵夥伴，台積電就COUPE與CPO架構的最新技術進展進行專題分享，Coherent解析驅動矽光子發展的核心光學技術，住友電工針對支援AI資料中心規模化部署的特種光纖解決方案進行分享，聯鈞光電則就先進光電封裝測試應用分享實務經驗。

台積電先進封裝整合四處處長侯上勇表示：「CPO技術的推進，需要供應鏈各環節的協同創新。台積電COUPE平台透過SoIC技術將電子積體電路與光子積體電路進行異質整合堆疊，預計按計劃將於今年進入量產階段，標誌著矽光子封裝技術正式從驗證走向商業部署。晶圓測試、光纖陣列單元與高速光學封裝組裝三大環節的技術突破，將是決定CPO能否順利規模化的關鍵。台積電期待透過SiPhIA的跨企業協作框架，與產業夥伴共同推進這三個環節的標準建立與量產落地。」

news.Title: 台股暴力反彈！早盤勁揚1289點「重返33K」 台積電漲85元至1845元
news.Content:
美伊雙方釋出停戰意願，中東戰火有望終止，大幅提振市場信心，週二美股四大指數全面上揚，帶動台股今（1）天上演暴力反彈，開盤先是上漲169.34點，以31892.33點開出，漲幅0.53％，隨後指數更一度大漲1289.42點至33012.41點，成功站回33000點大關。

今日權值股同樣一片紅，護國神山台積電（2330）漲80元來到1840元，早盤一度觸及1845元，暫報1835元；鴻海（2317）上漲7.5元至195元，暫報196元；聯發科（2454）上漲60元至1550元，暫報1515元；台達電（2308）漲85元至1465元，暫報1455元。

責任編輯／馮康蕙

news.Title: 3 Tech Stocks That Are Growing Revenue Faster Than Nvidia
news.Content:
Nvidia has become the most notable stock success story in the current artificial intelligence (AI) boom. Last year, the company had reported several quarters of triple-digit revenue growth, a notable accomplishment for a company with a $4 trillion market cap.

Even in the current quarter, revenue grew by an astounding 73% from a year ago. This feat is difficult to match even for much smaller companies that can grow revenue at a higher percentage rate more easily.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Still, a few tech stocks have revenue growth rates that surpass Nvidia's. Knowing that, investors might want to pay more attention to the following companies.

1. Micron Technology

In the second quarter of fiscal 2026 (ended Feb. 26), Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) earned $23.9 billion in revenue, a growth rate of 196%.

The memory chipmaker has built most of its growth on high-bandwidth memory (HBM), which powers many AI applications. Only three companies produce this type of memory, with Micron being the only one based in the U.S.

Admittedly, the historical challenge with Micron is the industry cycles, which tend to affect memory companies like Micron more than other types of chip stocks.

Nonetheless, Grand View Research forecasts a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) for AI of 31% through 2033. Also, analysts predict 191% revenue growth for the current fiscal year, suggesting Micron is not headed for a downturn anytime soon.

Amid that strength, Micron stock is up by 260% over the last year, and its 15 P/E ratio indicates that it could keep rising. Thus, with its business growth unlikely to stop anytime soon, Micron could be one of the best-performing stocks of 2026 .

2. CoreWeave

Demand for CoreWeave 's (NASDAQ: CRWV) AI-native cloud platform has helped revenue soar, taking it to almost $1.6 billion in Q4, a 110% increase.

CoreWeave stands out among cloud leaders Amazon and Microsoft by offering a platform specifically tailored for AI workloads. Still, the company has struggled to keep up with demand, with its backlog reaching almost $67 billion. Admittedly, meeting that demand is probably its most pressing challenge, as its debt has now surpassed $21 billion, a huge burden for a company with a $3.3 billion book value.

However, analysts forecast 143% revenue growth in the upcoming fiscal year, indicating growth should remain strong for the time being. Moreover, even amid volatility, the stock is up almost 72% since its debut around one year ago. Additionally, its price-to-sales (P/S) ratio is 5.7, a low valuation for a fast-growing company.

Story Continues

While CoreWeave's challenges may partially explain the low sales multiple, this valuation gives investors a compelling incentive to take a chance on the stock.

3. Nebius Group

Given CoreWeave's success, it is probably not surprising that its closest competitor, Nebius Group (NASDAQ: NBIS) , has also experienced rapid growth. In Q4, its $228 million in revenue rose by an astounding 547%.

Nebius is a Netherlands-based company that also offers cloud platforms specifically designed for AI workloads. Nebius also benefits from a relatively strong financial position, given its need to expand capacity. It holds about $3.8 billion in cash and claims only around $4.1 billion in total debt, a sustainable level for a company with $4.6 billion in book value.

Moreover, analysts also forecast 523% revenue growth over the next year, closely matching its Q4 growth rate.

Nonetheless, investors will have to pay for this growth. Its stock trades at a P/S ratio of 41, and with the stock up by more than 300% over the last year, it could limit near-term upside. Furthermore, the costs of meeting demand are likely to eat away at its liquidity, probably straining its balance sheet over time.

Still, with its massive growth and insatiable demand for AI-ready capacity, it is difficult to rule out Nebius's long-term growth potential.

Moreover, even amid volatility, the stock is up almost 72% since its debut around one year ago. Additionally, its price-to-sales (P/S) ratio is 5.7, a low valuation for a fast-growing company.

Story Continues

While CoreWeave's challenges may partially explain the low sales multiple, this valuation gives investors a compelling incentive to take a chance on the stock.

3. Nebius Group

Given CoreWeave's success, it is probably not surprising that its closest competitor, Nebius Group (NASDAQ: NBIS) , has also experienced rapid growth. In Q4, its $228 million in revenue rose by an astounding 547%.

Nebius is a Netherlands-based company that also offers cloud platforms specifically designed for AI workloads. Nebius also benefits from a relatively strong financial position, given its need to expand capacity. It holds about $3.8 billion in cash and claims only around $4.1 billion in total debt, a sustainable level for a company with $4.6 billion in book value.

Moreover, analysts also forecast 523% revenue growth over the next year, closely matching its Q4 growth rate.

Nonetheless, investors will have to pay for this growth. Its stock trades at a P/S ratio of 41, and with the stock up by more than 300% over the last year, it could limit near-term upside. Furthermore, the costs of meeting demand are likely to eat away at its liquidity, probably straining its balance sheet over time.

Still, with its massive growth and insatiable demand for AI-ready capacity, it is difficult to rule out Nebius's long-term growth potential.

news.Title: 3 Tech Stocks That Are Growing Revenue Faster Than Nvidia
news.Content:
Nvidia has become the most notable stock success story in the current artificial intelligence (AI) boom. Last year, the company had reported several quarters of triple-digit revenue growth, a notable accomplishment for a company with a $4 trillion market cap.

Even in the current quarter, revenue grew by an astounding 73% from a year ago. This feat is difficult to match even for much smaller companies that can grow revenue at a higher percentage rate more easily.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Still, a few tech stocks have revenue growth rates that surpass Nvidia's. Knowing that, investors might want to pay more attention to the following companies.

1. Micron Technology

In the second quarter of fiscal 2026 (ended Feb. 26), Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) earned $23.9 billion in revenue, a growth rate of 196%.

The memory chipmaker has built most of its growth on high-bandwidth memory (HBM), which powers many AI applications. Only three companies produce this type of memory, with Micron being the only one based in the U.S.

Admittedly, the historical challenge with Micron is the industry cycles, which tend to affect memory companies like Micron more than other types of chip stocks.

Nonetheless, Grand View Research forecasts a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) for AI of 31% through 2033. Also, analysts predict 191% revenue growth for the current fiscal year, suggesting Micron is not headed for a downturn anytime soon.

Amid that strength, Micron stock is up by 260% over the last year, and its 15 P/E ratio indicates that it could keep rising. Thus, with its business growth unlikely to stop anytime soon, Micron could be one of the best-performing stocks of 2026 .

2. CoreWeave

Demand for CoreWeave 's (NASDAQ: CRWV) AI-native cloud platform has helped revenue soar, taking it to almost $1.6 billion in Q4, a 110% increase.

CoreWeave stands out among cloud leaders Amazon and Microsoft by offering a platform specifically tailored for AI workloads. Still, the company has struggled to keep up with demand, with its backlog reaching almost $67 billion. Admittedly, meeting that demand is probably its most pressing challenge, as its debt has now surpassed $21 billion, a huge burden for a company with a $3.3 billion book value.

However, analysts forecast 143% revenue growth in the upcoming fiscal year, indicating growth should remain strong for the time being. Moreover, even amid volatility, the stock is up almost 72% since its debut around one year ago. Additionally, its price-to-sales (P/S) ratio is 5.7, a low valuation for a fast-growing company.

Story Continues

While CoreWeave's challenges may partially explain the low sales multiple, this valuation gives investors a compelling incentive to take a chance on the stock.

3. Nebius Group

Given CoreWeave's success, it is probably not surprising that its closest competitor, Nebius Group (NASDAQ: NBIS) , has also experienced rapid growth. In Q4, its $228 million in revenue rose by an astounding 547%.

Nebius is a Netherlands-based company that also offers cloud platforms specifically designed for AI workloads. Nebius also benefits from a relatively strong financial position, given its need to expand capacity. It holds about $3.8 billion in cash and claims only around $4.1 billion in total debt, a sustainable level for a company with $4.6 billion in book value.

Moreover, analysts also forecast 523% revenue growth over the next year, closely matching its Q4 growth rate.

Nonetheless, investors will have to pay for this growth. Its stock trades at a P/S ratio of 41, and with the stock up by more than 300% over the last year, it could limit near-term upside. Furthermore, the costs of meeting demand are likely to eat away at its liquidity, probably straining its balance sheet over time.

Still, with its massive growth and insatiable demand for AI-ready capacity, it is difficult to rule out Nebius's long-term growth potential.

news.Title: 中東戰爭降溫！台股一度暴漲逾千點「史上盤中第四大」
news.Content:
受中東戰爭再度降溫消息激勵，周二美國股市強勁上漲，台積電ADR強漲6.78%，台積電台北現股今（1）日盤中一度上漲85元，帶動大盤漲逾千點，寫下史上盤中第四大，市值一天暴增逾4兆元。

隨着伊朗總統裴澤斯基安釋出和平信號，宣稱德黑蘭有意結束與美國及以色列的衝突，資金大舉從能源避險標的回流風險資產，觸發美股各大指數集體暴漲，道瓊工業指數上漲1125.37點、2.49%；標普500指數上漲2.91%；那斯達克指數上漲3.83%；費城半導體指數大漲6.24%。

台股今日開盤勢如破竹，最高觸及33049點，較昨日收盤（31722點）勁揚1327點，創下史上第四大漲點，並一舉收復三萬二、三萬三兩道整數關卡，市值一舉從103.5兆元攀升到107.8兆元，暴增逾4兆元。

儘管行情回溫，永豐投顧提醒，由於週二（3/31）曾跌破三萬二關卡並創下收盤新低，短線仍需消化先前的停損壓力；雖然今日強勢反彈，但投資人仍應關注低點破位後帶來的震盪衝擊。

news.Title: 開盤／戰事降溫引爆行情！台積電狂飆85元　台股暴漲近1200點
news.Content:
財經中心／余國棟報導

美股週二在伊朗總統首度釋出「願結束戰爭」訊號，加上美國總統川普暗示衝突可能不會持續太久，市場風險偏好急速回溫，四大指數全面強彈，帶動全球股市同步上攻。資金從避險資產回流股市，形成強勁多頭動能。中東局勢出現轉機激勵市場信心，台股今（1）日開盤強勢大漲1274點，櫃買指數同步勁揚4.27%，在權值股與電子族群領軍下，盤面全面噴出。

戰事降溫 台股直接跳空噴出

受到此利多激勵，台股今日開盤直接跳空大漲，加權指數來到32997點，上漲1274點、漲幅4.01%，盤中一度衝上33012點，顯示買盤力道強勁。櫃買指數同步上揚4.27%，中小型股也全面跟進，呈現價量齊揚格局。

倫元投顧陳學進分析師認為，今日台股也可望迎來報復性反彈大漲的行情，加上昨日上市櫃融資一口氣驟減逾156億元，因此，今日只要不要出現「虎頭蛇尾」的情況，並把昨日的黑K棒給完全吃回來，如無意外！則昨日因恐慌所造就的31705低點，將可望是下檔關鍵支撐之所在，一切就待美伊雙方最後會談結果之情況而定，今日相關記憶體族群也將可望連動反彈，惟整體籌碼面仍略顯凌亂，在整體趨勢尚未扭轉上來之前，策略上仍是不可掉以輕心。

電子族群全面暴動 DRAM、半導體成主攻核心

從類股表現來看，電子族群毫無疑問成為盤面主角，半導體類股上漲約4.84%，電腦及周邊族群勁揚5.79%，顯示資金高度集中在AI與電子權值股。

進一步觀察產業細項，DRAM族群漲幅高達6.87%，成為最強勢焦點，南亞科大漲逾6%，帶動記憶體族群全面轉強；再生晶圓與半導體相關供應鏈同步上攻，辛耘漲幅達7%以上，反映市場對半導體景氣回溫預期。

印刷電路板族群同樣表現亮眼，華通大漲逾6%，顯示資金從權值股擴散至中游電子供應鏈。反觀傳產族群則相對弱勢，造紙類股下跌約3.83%，成為盤面少數綠色族群，資金明顯轉向電子股。

台積電狂飆85元 權值股成大盤暴漲關鍵

權值股方面，台積電今日開盤大漲85元，股價來到1845元，漲幅達4.83%，單一個股對指數貢獻極大，成為推升大盤飆漲的最主要動能。從盤面結構來看，幾乎可說「台積電一檔撐起半邊天」。

觀察成交結構，台積電買盤積極，委買張數明顯高於委賣，顯示市場追價意願強烈，短線資金持續湧入。電子權值股如台達電同樣大漲逾6%，鴻海也上漲超過3%，形成大型權值股齊揚格局，進一步放大指數漲幅。

啟發投顧容逸燊分析師認為，台股昨日往季線測試，連假前賣壓及季底結帳賣壓湧出，使高檔股拉回修正，但昨日融資大減110億，短線已有多殺多現象，今日下半場後若可穩住3萬2，賣壓應不至延續到最後一日。昨日記憶體及CPO再度重挫，分別有接近1/3股票跌停，已有加速趕底狀況，記憶體可

news.Title: 台股累計至3月底開戶數衝破1400萬人　月增16.2萬人
news.Content:
（中央社記者曾仁凱台北2026年04月1日電）台股交投熱絡，根據台灣證券交易所統計，截至3月底，台股累積總開戶數達到1410萬2236人，正式衝破1400萬人大關，續創歷史新高，比起2月大增16萬2249人。

進一步觀察投資人開戶數的年齡層分布，3月新增開戶數中，20至30歲新增開戶4萬9621人，增加最多；其次是19歲以下新增4萬6950人。合計30歲以下新增開戶數達9萬6571人，占3月整體新增開戶數近6成，顯示台股持續朝向年輕化趨勢發展。

根據證交所3月投資人開戶數年齡分布統計表，19歲以下累積開戶數為69萬9068人，月增4萬6950人；20至30歲累積開戶數173萬9407人，月增4萬9621人；31至40歲累積開戶數228萬6743人，月增2萬6995人；41至50歲累積開戶數264萬3509人，月增2萬2358人；51至60歲累積開戶數236萬5484人，月增1萬728人；61歲以上累積開戶數425萬7832人，月增4176人；法人等其他累積開戶數11萬193人，月增1421人。

news.Title: 台股早盤大漲1285點　收復季線拚站穩33000點
news.Content:
（中央社記者鍾榮峰台北1日電）美國和伊朗釋出衝突緩和訊號，美股4大指數強漲，激勵台股今天開盤跳空大漲千點強勢反彈，一舉收復季線約32259點，早盤最高33012.41點，大漲1289.42點，力拚站穩33000點。

權王台積電早盤最高1845元，漲85元，漲幅4.83%，市值大增新台幣2.2兆元，其他電子權值股台達電勁揚近6%，鴻海揚升逾4%，聯發科漲2.6%，日月光投控勁揚逾6%。記憶體族群南亞科漲逾5%，華邦電大漲逾5.5%。

證券法人指出，美伊戰事緊張情勢露曙光，台股早盤強彈收復季線，不過中東戰事消息每日詭譎多變，在雙方未正式撤兵前，仍須提防行情波動。（編輯：張均懋）1150401

news.Title: 好消息來了！台股大漲近1300點 台積電飆85元衝上1845元
news.Content:
美伊衝突出現轉機，伊朗總統裴澤斯基安明確表示願意結束戰爭。刺激美股四大指數飆漲，日韓股早盤跳漲超過4%，台股早盤以31,892.33點開出，隨後大漲近1300點，重返33,000點大關，權值股台積電狂飆85元，觸及1845元，聯發科跳漲60元，觸及1550元，鴻海同步上漲8.5元，觸及196元。

台股3月暴跌3691點，創下單月最大跌點，跌幅達10.42%，一口氣摔破32,000點大關。如今，美伊戰爭就此走向和平，台股後市也會趨於穩定，有「多頭總司令」之稱的東海大學財金系客座教授張錫則認為，台積電在1800元以下閉眼買，今年有望衝上2500元，明年上看3000元。台積電昨收在1760元。

針對台股後市，工商報導，野村投信全球整合投資方案部主管游景德則認為，市場在恐慌性下跌時，往往過度放大短期風險，但在台股基本面未出現系統性風險的情況下，跌深反而提供了重新檢視資產配置與產業權重的機會。

美股四大指數勁揚，費城半導體指數一口氣大漲6.24%，台積電ADR漲21.45美元（或6.78）至337.95美元，輝達漲5.59%收在174.40美元，科技巨頭中以Meta大漲6.67%最為強勢，Google母公司Alphabet勁揚5.02%。

news.Title: 〈ETF成分股調整〉群益00923換股4進4出 華通、華邦電等低碳獲利尖兵股入列
news.Content:
臺灣指數公司公告 3 檔台股 ETF 追蹤指數成分股定審結果，其中，永豐 ESG 低碳高息 (00930-TW)、台新永續高息中小 (00936-TW) 並無異動，而群益台 ESG 低碳 50(00923-TW) 此次換股四進四出，新增納入具備高獲利能力 (ROE) 且碳排放密度優異的 AI 半導體、高階通路與電子零組件尖兵，包括華通、華邦電、文曄、穎崴，顯見指數正由傳統市值權重，轉向低碳競爭力靠攏。

00923 追蹤「臺灣指數公司特選臺灣 ESG 低碳 50 指數」，成分股納入與刪除之變動將自 2026 年 4 月 1 日起生效。本次換股新增納入 4 檔，分別為華通 (2313-TW)、華邦電 (2344-TW)、文曄 (3036-TW)、穎崴 (6515-TW)；同時刪除 4 檔成分股，分別為東元 (1504-TW)、英業達 (2356-TW)、和碩 (4938-TW)、上海商銀 (5876-TW)。

00923 於 2023 年 3 月 8 日掛牌上市，核心邏輯並非單純追蹤市值，而是透過 ESG 評分、低碳密度 (營收碳排比) 以及獲利能力 (ROE) 進行三重篩選。

從此次換股名單來觀察，穎崴與文曄分別屬於半導體測試介面與全球電子通路，在 AI 浪潮下，這些企業的獲利成長性較高，且其「碳排放密度」相對於傳統重工業或舊型代工廠更具競爭力。而華通與華邦電皆為電子零組件廠商，此次入選成分股，顯示公司在能源管理或碳排控制上已達到指數門檻，足以替換獲利能力下滑或碳排效率不佳的舊成員。

進一步觀察剔除名單，上海商銀等金融股雖被市場視為低碳，但 00923 有市值規模與獲利成長的動態比較，若其他科技股的分數更高，金融股的權重就容易下滑，甚至摔出成分股。而英業達與和碩皆為代工廠，東元則是重電指標股，這些公司面臨傳統製造轉型的挑戰，若碳排放密度未能跟上同業的減碳速度，或者 ROE 未達前段班，便會被篩選機制剔除。

news.Title: 台積電漲85元 台股勁揚1276點 重返33000大關
news.Content:
台股今（1）日早盤開高震盪，上漲1276點，來到33012點，重返3萬3大關，漲幅4%，預估成交量9300億，櫃買指數則開高震盪，早盤來到320.69點，上漲13.03點，漲幅4.26%。

電子權值股部分，台積電（2330）早盤來到1845元，上漲85元，漲幅4.82%，鴻海（2317）早盤來到195.5元，上漲8元，漲幅4.26%，聯發科（2454）則來到1540元，上漲50元，漲幅3.35%。

今日記憶體族群強勢上漲，華邦電來到95.5元，上漲5.2元，漲幅5.54%，南亞科來到208.5元，漲10元，漲幅5.03%，力積電來到55.9元，漲幅5.27%，群聯也有逾7%的漲幅。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: Kioxia部分產線EOL釋出，華邦電和旺宏可望受益
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】記憶體大廠Kioxia於2026年3月31日發布EOL（產品終止供應）通知，宣布將停止供應包括15奈米、24奈米與32奈米的製程，及BiCS Flash第三代在內的多項NAND Flash產品，隨市場供需將出現變化，SLC等的台資NAND晶片供應商華邦電(2344)和旺宏(2337)，將可受益。Kioxia發出公開信，通知客戶，停止供應包括15奈米、24奈米與32奈米的製程，及BiCS Flash第三代在內的，SLC、MLC、TLC及Wafer、BGA、TSOP、eMMC、UFS等多種封裝與應用的NAND。

依照EOL，Kioxia最後接單日為2026年9月30日，最終出貨將延續至2028年12月31日。Kioxia此舉，主要是持續退出成熟與舊世代製程，將資源集中於更高層數3D NAND與先進產品。

事實上，15奈米、24奈米與32奈米的製程，及BiCS Flash第三代在內的多項NAND Flash產品，屬於相當成熟的舊製程產品，Kioxia退出意味著其持續往先進與主流製程邁進，而目前還有相關業務的，則是主攻SLC等非高階NAND晶片的華邦電與旺宏，即使這些中低階產線在需求端未有起色，但考量供應端的持續退出，無疑替SLC等NAND晶片注入新生機，晶片報價可望因產出減少而報價上漲，替旺宏與華邦電營運加分。

news.Title: 友達ADR31日下跌0.05美元跌幅1.16%折台股13.59元
中華電信ADR31日上漲0.23美元漲幅0.55%折台股135.08元
聯電ADR31日上漲0.37美元漲幅4.30%折台股57.44元
聯電ADR31日上漲0.37美元漲幅4.30%折台股57.44元
台積電ADR31日上漲21.45美元漲幅6.78%折台股2161.53元
台積電ADR31日上漲21.45美元漲幅6.78%折台股2161.53元
熊本二廠獲准升級3奈米製程，台積電ADR週二飆漲6.78%、季線連四紅
news.Content:
【財訊快報／陳孟朔】受到美股週二出現十個月來最旺表現的牽引，全球晶圓代工一哥--台積電(2330)(美股代碼TSM)ADR收盤強彈21.45美元或6.78%，報337.95美元，創下自2025年10月13日飆高7.92%以來半單日最旺表現，成交金額達60.58億美元。儘管週二股價表現亮眼，但受中東戰事引發的市場動盪影響，台積電ADR在3月仍累計下跌9.78%，創下自2025年2月急瀉13.75%以來最遜色的單月表現。不過，若從季度表現來看，台積電第一季仍逆勢上漲11.21%，達成連續四季收紅的紀錄。

在此之前，經濟部投資審議會於同日核准台積電在日控股子公司JASM位於熊本縣的第二晶圓廠(Fab23 P2)，將原定的6奈米製程工藝正式升級至3奈米製程。

根據規劃，該廠月產能達15000片12吋晶圓，預計自2028年開始進行設備安裝設定並啟動晶圓量產。市場人士指出，製程技術的提升不僅反映出日本半導體產業鏈對高階晶片的強烈需求，也進一步鞏固台積電在全球晶圓代工領域的領先地位。尤其在AI浪潮推動下，3奈米產能的佈局將成為未來幾年營收成長的核心動能。

目前投資人正密切關注台積電在全球各地的產能佈局進度。隨著熊本二廠製程升級獲准，加上輝達與邁威爾等大客戶在AI基礎設施上的持續擴張，法人看好台積電在跨國營運與技術領先的雙重優勢下，第二季表現有望隨地緣政治局勢降溫而回穩。

news.Title: 經部核准台積電熊本二廠改3奈米製程
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-01 08:36:01 丁于珊 發佈

經濟部投資審議會昨(3/31)日核准1件僑外投資、6件對外投資以及1件對中國投資，合計8件重大投資案件，其中包含台積電(2330)以300億美元增資資英屬維京群島TSMC GLOBAL LTD.，用以低外匯避險成本，以及申請變更日本JAPAN ADVANCED SEMICONDUCTOR MANUFACTURING, INC.(JASM)投資計畫，將熊本二廠製程技術及產能變更為生產3奈米(nm)製程產品。

台積電日前宣布，將日本熊本第2座晶圓廠改為生產3奈米製程，昨日經濟部投資審議會已核准台積電應市場及客戶需求，申請變更日本JASM的投資計畫，將製程技術及產能變更為生產3奈米製程，月產能達15,000片的12吋晶圓，並預計自2028年進行設備安裝設定及開始晶圓量產。同時，投審會也核准台積電以300億美元增資資英屬維京群島TSMC GLOBAL，主要投資於銀行定期存款與美金債券，以賺取孳息並降低外匯避險成本。

而在對外投資部分，投審會昨日還核准長興(1717)以8,415萬美元增資薩摩亞ETERNAL HOLDINGS INC.，包括轉增資薩摩亞ETERNAL NANYANG INVESTMENT CO., LTD.償還銀行借款及轉增資馬來西亞ETERNAL MATERIALS (MALAYSIA) SDN.BHD.，用以新增電子材料塗布線產線，從事乾膜光阻相關應用產品製造業務。

和潤(6592)以20.46億泰銖（約折合6,541萬美元）受讓取得泰國上市公司TIDLOR HOLDINGS PUBLIC COMPANY LIMITED股權，該企業係從事汽車與機車動產抵押貸款、卡車及二手卡車分期、保險經紀及整合金融服務平台等業務。

智崴(5263)以7,840萬美元投資設立荷蘭FLYOVER ATTRACTIONS B.V.，從事經營電影製作（不含電視電影）；電影、電視及影像作品發行等業務。

和泰車(2207)以101.52億日元（約折合6,428.16萬美元）併購日本車商通路，受讓取得日本MINAMI KANTO HINO MOTORS, LTD. 80%股權，從事商用車車輛銷售、售後服務、保養與維修服務等業務。

在上市/櫃公司對中國投資部分，投審會核准統一超(2912)以第三地區投資事業之自有資金2.69億人民幣（約3,809萬美元），間接增資中國地區統一超商（浙江），從事食品銷售、餐飲服務、日常用品銷售，線上APP平台有相關之商品販售等業務。

在僑外投資部分，投審會核准丹麥商ORSTED WIND POWER TW HOLDING A/S以相當於新台幣70億元等值外幣，認購沃旭西北大彰化控股增資股份，資金用於償還集團公司間貸款，或支應未來大彰化西北離岸風力發電專案之離岸風電相關支出。

news.Title: 【統一證券晨訊】台股今日強彈重返季線
news.Content:
日期：2026年 4月 1日

※盤勢分析

美伊雙方釋出停戰曙光，台股今日強彈重返季線

◎昨日盤勢

美伊戰事雙方持續僵持尚未停火，儘管周二早上華爾街日報報導川普願意在

荷木茲海峽即使關閉，美軍也將會結束戰爭，美期盤後盤上漲。然台股週二出現

逆勢下殺，指數摜破季線。盤面僅受惠國際紙漿報價上漲的造紙族群表現強勢，

之前漲多的中小型電子股出現多殺多賣壓，多檔個股打到跌停，整體買盤偏向觀

望。權值股方面，台積電下跌1.12%，鴻海下跌3.35%，聯發科下跌1.32%，廣達

下跌0.89%，台達電下跌7.07%。

盤面強勢股，華紙、恩德、康霈*、佰研、寶隆、同致、永裕、地球、微程

式、廣華-KY、寶緯、心城鎂等漲停；光鼎、九豪、榮田、印能科技、泓瀚等漲

幅5%以上；盤面弱勢股，倍利科下跌10.91%，南亞科、穩懋、旺宏、南電、全新

、欣興等共34檔跌停；景碩、世芯-KY、一詮、威剛、鼎元、環宇-KY、南亞等跌

幅9%以上。終場台灣加權指數下跌795.17點，以31722.99點作收，成交量為

7924.51億元。觀察盤面變化，三大類股同步下跌，電子下跌2.69%、傳產下跌

2.25%、金融下跌0.39%。在次族群部份僅造紙、水泥表現較佳，分別上漲0.68%

、0.39%。

◎資金動向

三大法人合計賣超985.59億元。其中外資賣超807.46億元，投信買超32.04

億元，自營商賣超210.17億元。外資買超前五大為力積電、兆豐金、新興、合庫

金、中鼎；賣超前五大為台新新光金、潤泰新、鴻海、台積電、群創。投信買超

前五大為華邦電、台新新光金、大聯大、中信金、華通；賣超前五大為仁寶、南

亞科、聯電、旺宏、台化。資券變化方面，融資減109.84億元，融資餘額為

3817.25億元，融券增0.64萬張，融券餘額為17.53萬張。外資台指期部位，空單

減少68口，淨空單部位37214口。借券賣出金額為271.33億元。類股成交比重：

電子85.04%、12.69%、金融2.27%。

◎今日盤勢分析

美國周二(31日) 公布數據顯示，3月消費者信心指數升至91.8，高於2月修

正後的91，也優於市場預期。美國勞工統計局公布職缺與勞動流動調查(JOLTS)

顯示，2月職缺數降至688萬個，該數據大致符合市場預期。輝達週二宣布與

Marvell建立戰略合作關係，輝達將投資Marvell20億美元，未來Marvell將會輝

達提供客製化XPU及兼容NVLink Fusion的擴展網路晶片，Marvell上漲逾12%。中

東戰事部分，伊朗總統首度鬆口「願結束戰爭」後，加上美國總統川普暗示戰事

可能不會持續太久，市場欣喜若狂，風險偏好回升，油價走低，週二美股四大指

數強彈，台積電ADR上漲6.78%，台指期夜盤上漲1130點，有助於今日台股重新收

復季線。台股後市分析如下：

第一、國發會發布2月景氣概況，景氣對策信號綜合判斷分數上升1分至40分

，寫下2021年7月以來最高分，燈號更連續第三個月亮出象徵熱絡的紅燈，國發

會經濟發展處處長陳美菊表示，這顯示國內經濟持續穩健。

第二、在AI需求快速升溫帶動下，全球半導體產業正由傳統晶圓代工模式，

進一步走向涵蓋製造、封裝、測試與光罩供應的「Foundry 2.0」新階段。

Counterpoint Research最新研究，2025年全球Foundry 2.0市場營收達3,200億

美元，年增16％，市場預估2026年全球先進封裝產能可望年增約80％，CoWoS-S

與CoWoS-L將持續成為擴產重點，相關供應鏈包括弘塑、萬潤、均華及辛耘等，

可望受惠。

第三、技術面觀察，週二台股出現量增摜破季線，技術指標KD、RSI向下、

MACD綠色柱狀體擴大，整體技術面呈弱勢整理。台股3月月K線以黑K作收，終結

連續三個月上漲格局，短線上靜待落底止跌K線出現。

第四、盤面資金聚焦造紙、工具機、部分車用電子等表現較佳，包括華紙、

寶隆、恩德、同致表現強勢。

◎投資策略

美伊總統雙方釋出停戰曙光，市場風險偏好回升、油價回檔、美股四大指數

強彈。台股週二摜破季線，3月月K線以黑K作收，終結連續三個月上漲格局，在

美伊雙方釋出停戰消息，台股今日可望出現強彈收復季線。惟中東戰事消息每日

詭譎多變，在雙方未正式撤兵前，仍須提防行情波動。中長線佈局者仍建議嚴控

持股比例，長線追蹤族群：台積電及先進製程/封裝相關、高速傳輸(含光傳輸)

、載板與PCB、電源管理、散熱、衛星航太、散裝及高殖利率概念等族群。

荷木茲海峽即使關閉，美軍也將會結束戰爭，美期盤後盤上漲。然台股週二出現

逆勢下殺，指數摜破季線。盤面僅受惠國際紙漿報價上漲的造紙族群表現強勢，

之前漲多的中小型電子股出現多殺多賣壓，多檔個股打到跌停，整體買盤偏向觀

望。權值股方面，台積電下跌1.12%，鴻海下跌3.35%，聯發科下跌1.32%，廣達

下跌0.89%，台達電下跌7.07%。

盤面強勢股，華紙、恩德、康霈*、佰研、寶隆、同致、永裕、地球、微程

式、廣華-KY、寶緯、心城鎂等漲停；光鼎、九豪、榮田、印能科技、泓瀚等漲

幅5%以上；盤面弱勢股，倍利科下跌10.91%，南亞科、穩懋、旺宏、南電、全新

、欣興等共34檔跌停；景碩、世芯-KY、一詮、威剛、鼎元、環宇-KY、南亞等跌

幅9%以上。終場台灣加權指數下跌795.17點，以31722.99點作收，成交量為

7924.51億元。觀察盤面變化，三大類股同步下跌，電子下跌2.69%、傳產下跌

2.25%、金融下跌0.39%。在次族群部份僅造紙、水泥表現較佳，分別上漲0.68%

、0.39%。

◎資金動向

三大法人合計賣超985.59億元。其中外資賣超807.46億元，投信買超32.04

億元，自營商賣超210.17億元。外資買超前五大為力積電、兆豐金、新興、合庫

金、中鼎；賣超前五大為台新新光金、潤泰新、鴻海、台積電、群創。投信買超

前五大為華邦電、台新新光金、大聯大、中信金、華通；賣超前五大為仁寶、南

亞科、聯電、旺宏、台化。資券變化方面，融資減109.84億元，融資餘額為

3817.25億元，融券增0.64萬張，融券餘額為17.53萬張。外資台指期部位，空單

減少68口，淨空單部位37214口。借券賣出金額為271.33億元。類股成交比重：

電子85.04%、12.69%、金融2.27%。

◎今日盤勢分析

美國周二(31日) 公布數據顯示，3月消費者信心指數升至91.8，高於2月修

正後的91，也優於市場預期。美國勞工統計局公布職缺與勞動流動調查(JOLTS)

顯示，2月職缺數降至688萬個，該數據大致符合市場預期。輝達週二宣布與

Marvell建立戰略合作關係，輝達將投資Marvell20億美元，未來Marvell將會輝

達提供客製化XPU及兼容NVLink Fusion的擴展網路晶片，Marvell上漲逾12%。中

東戰事部分，伊朗總統首度鬆口「願結束戰爭」後，加上美國總統川普暗示戰事

可能不會持續太久，市場欣喜若狂，風險偏好回升，油價走低，週二美股四大指

數強彈，台積電ADR上漲6.78%，台指期夜盤上漲1130點，有助於今日台股重新收

復季線。台股後市分析如下：

第一、國發會發布2月景氣概況，景氣對策信號綜合判斷分數上升1分至40分

，寫下2021年7月以來最高分，燈號更連續第三個月亮出象徵熱絡的紅燈，國發

會經濟發展處處長陳美菊表示，這顯示國內經濟持續穩健。

第二、在AI需求快速升溫帶動下，全球半導體產業正由傳統晶圓代工模式，

進一步走向涵蓋製造、封裝、測試與光罩供應的「Foundry 2.0」新階段。

Counterpoint Research最新研究，2025年全球Foundry 2.0市場營收達3,200億

美元，年增16％，市場預估2026年全球先進封裝產能可望年增約80％，CoWoS-S

與CoWoS-L將持續成為擴產重點，相關供應鏈包括弘塑、萬潤、均華及辛耘等，

可望受惠。

第三、技術面觀察，週二台股出現量增摜破季線，技術指標KD、RSI向下、

MACD綠色柱狀體擴大，整體技術面呈弱勢整理。台股3月月K線以黑K作收，終結

連續三個月上漲格局，短線上靜待落底止跌K線出現。

第四、盤面資金聚焦造紙、工具機、部分車用電子等表現較佳，包括華紙、

寶隆、恩德、同致表現強勢。

◎投資策略

美伊總統雙方釋出停戰曙光，市場風險偏好回升、油價回檔、美股四大指數

強彈。台股週二摜破季線，3月月K線以黑K作收，終結連續三個月上漲格局，在

美伊雙方釋出停戰消息，台股今日可望出現強彈收復季線。惟中東戰事消息每日

詭譎多變，在雙方未正式撤兵前，仍須提防行情波動。中長線佈局者仍建議嚴控

持股比例，長線追蹤族群：台積電及先進製程/封裝相關、高速傳輸(含光傳輸)

、載板與PCB、電源管理、散熱、衛星航太、散裝及高殖利率概念等族群。

news.Title: Apple's 50-year journey from garage to tech titan
news.Content:
By Aditya Soni and Akash Sriram

April 1 (Reuters) - In early 1976 in California, Steve Wozniak had just completed the design of a computer circuit board he intended to share with fellow hobbyists at a prominent local club. His friend ‌Steve Jobs also saw a business opportunity to manufacture and sell the boards, and thus Apple was born.

The company turns ‌50 on Wednesday. Its rise has shaped both the technology industry and popular culture by making first desktop computers and then smartphones mainstream, popularizing mobile apps and showing ​how tightly integrated devices and software can work.

But the iPhone maker is now under pressure to show it can remain a technology powerhouse in the age of artificial intelligence as software rivals Alphabet and Microsoft spend tens of billions of dollars to seize a lead.

Its stock is the second-worst performer among the "Magnificent Seven" since OpenAI launched ChatGPT in November 2022.

Despite embedding machine learning features in its chips since 2017, analysts and investors say ‌delays in roll-out of features, including a revamped Siri, ⁠suggest Apple was underprepared for how consumers would use AI.

Rivals such as OpenAI are also planning to launch AI devices that aim to shake the long-held dominance of smartphones.

Still, Apple's devices remain widely popular.

Strong demand for ⁠the latest iPhone 17 series drove its December-quarter earnings, while the $599 MacBook Neo - its cheapest laptop ever - had a strong launch.

"The company made it fifty years with no one truly competing with its integrated business model; the fate of its next fifty years may rest on the question of just ​how ​compelling AI ends up being — and if OpenAI can out-Apple the original," independent ​tech analyst Ben Thompson said on Stratechery.com on Tuesday.

Here ‌are five graphics that capture Apple's rise:

APPLE'S BLISTERING STOCK PRICE GROWTH

The company went public in 1980, but its shares picked up dramatically after the turn of the century as the iPhone became a bestseller and its device lineup expanded. Its in-house M-series chips also drove a surge in Mac sales, aiding the stock.

ANNUAL REVENUE APPROACHES HALF A TRILLION

Apple, one of the world's most valuable companies, also ranks among the biggest by revenue. Thanks to strong demand for its latest iPhone series, it is expected to post sales of $465 billion in its ongoing fiscal year ‌ending in September.

SERVICES BECOME KEY DRIVER OF APPLE'S GROWTH

Apple's services business, which houses ​its App Store, Apple Music and its streaming service, has become a major ​driver of growth as its expanding base of devices brings in ​steady income from subscriptions and commissions on app sales. That has also led to high-profiles tussles with the ‌likes of Epic Games, which has tried to challenge ​its control over in-app payments.

Story Continues

CHINA, EMERGING ​MARKETS GROW THEIR SHARE OF APPLE REVENUE

As the smartphone market in the U.S. saturates, China and emerging markets such as India are playing a greater role in driving its revenue.

THE PRODUCTS THAT MAKE APPLE

The circuit board Wozniak shared with Jobs in 1976 ​became Apple I, the first in a line ‌of products in the company's journey from a garage startup to a consumer electronics giant. Over the years, Apple has ​made hits such as the iPod, and its line-up now includes smartwatches, wireless earbuds and mixed-reality headset Vision Pro.

(Reporting ​by Aditya Soni and Akash Sriram in Bengaluru; Editing by Devika Syamnath)

news.Title: 國票證券：台股估重回五日線之上震盪
news.Content:
【國票觀點】

今日盤勢及未來走勢：(大盤高檔震盪，短線留意工具機族群)

美伊戰事緊張情勢終露曙光，帶動市場全數反彈，美四大指數終場全數收漲，幅度介於 2.49% 至6.24%，其中費半指數上漲6.24%，台積電ADR上漲6.78%，台指期夜盤上漲1130點，預估今日台股開高於盤上，盤中科技權值股或有買盤湧入，挹注指數重回五日線之上震盪。

短線看法：美國科技權值股走勢疲弱，拖累台股同步轉弱，加上清明連假將至，多數投資人傾向降低持股水位，導致本週賣壓明顯加重，指數亦為近期首度跌破季線，短線觀察重點仍在季線支撐，只要後續1–2個交易日能迅速站回季線之上，盤勢仍有機會止穩回升。

操作建議：面對當前盤勢震盪，可適度增加傳產類股比重，以強化投組抗震能力，其中隨著日本升息預期持續上升，日圓恐持續面臨升值壓力，台灣工具機有望拉開與日製工具機間的價差，工具機需求者可能會將訂單轉至台灣工具機廠商。

重點產業與族群：

工具機-1590亞德客-KY、1597直得、2049上銀

觀點：隨中國3月PMI回升至50.4重返擴張區間，顯示製造業景氣回溫，預期後續設備投資需求將逐步回升，有利工具機族群接單動能改善，基本面具落底回升契機。

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Content:
【昨日盤勢】：

美伊總統雙方釋出停戰曙光，市場風險偏好回升、油價回檔、美股四大指數強彈。台股週二摜破季線，3月月K線以黑K作收，終結連續三個月上漲格局，在美伊雙方釋出停戰消息，台股今日可望出現強彈收復季線。惟中東戰事消息每日詭譎多變，在雙方未正式撤兵前，仍須提防行情波動。中長線佈局者仍建議嚴控持股比例，長線追蹤族群：台積電及先進製程/封裝相關、高速傳輸(含光傳輸)、載板與PCB、電源管理、散熱、衛星航太、散裝及高殖利率概念等族群。

三大法人合計賣超985.59億元。其中外資賣超807.46億元，投信買超32.04億元，自營商賣超210.17億元。外資買超前五大為力積電、兆豐金、新興、合庫金、中鼎；賣超前五大為台新新光金、潤泰新、鴻海、台積電、群創。投信買超前五大為華邦電、台新新光金、大聯大、中信金、華通；賣超前五大為仁寶、南亞科、聯電、旺宏、台化。資券變化方面，融資減109.84億元，融資餘額為3817.25億元，融券增0.64萬張，融券餘額為17.53萬張。外資台指期部位，空單減少68口，淨空單部位37214口。借券賣出金額為271.33億元。類股成交比重：電子85.04%、12.69%、金融2.27%。

【今日盤勢分析】：

美國周二 (31 日) 公布數據顯示，3 月消費者信心指數升至 91.8，高於 2 月修正後的 91，也優於市場預期。美國勞工統計局公布職缺與勞動流動調查 (JOLTS) 顯示，2 月職缺數降至 688 萬個，該數據大致符合市場預期。輝達週二宣布與 Marvell 建立戰略合作關係，輝達將投資 Marvell20 億美元，未來 Marvell 將會輝達提供客製化XPU及兼容 NVLink Fusion 的擴展網路晶片，Marvell上漲逾12%。中東戰事部分，伊朗總統首度鬆口「願結束戰爭」後，加上美國總統川普暗示戰事可能不會持續太久，市場欣喜若狂，風險偏好回升，油價走低，週二美股四大指數強彈，台積電ADR上漲6.78%，台指期夜盤上漲1130點，有助於今日台股重新收復季線。台股後市分析如下：

第一、國發會發布2月景氣概況，景氣對策信號綜合判斷分數上升1分至40分，寫下2021年7月以來最高分，燈號更連續第三個月亮出象徵熱絡的紅燈，國發會經濟發展處處長陳美菊表示，這顯示國內經濟持續穩健。

第二、在AI需求快速升溫帶動下，全球半導體產業正由傳統晶圓代工模式，進一步走向涵蓋製造、封裝、測試與光罩供應的「Foundry 2.0」新階段。Counterpoint Research最新研究，2025年全球Foundry 2.0市場營收達3,200億美元，年增16％，市場預估2026年全球先進封裝產能可望年增約80％，CoWoS-S與CoWoS-L將持續成為擴產重點，相關供應鏈包括弘塑、萬潤、均華及辛耘等，可望受惠。

第三、技術面觀察，週二台股出現量增摜破季線，技術指標KD、RSI向下、MACD綠色柱狀體擴大，整體技術面呈弱勢整理。台股3月月K線以黑K作收，終結連續三個月上漲格局，短線上靜待落底止跌K線出現。

第四、盤面資金聚焦造紙、工具機、部分車用電子等表現較佳，包括華紙、寶隆、恩德、同致表現強勢。

【投資策略】：

美伊總統雙方釋出停戰曙光，市場風險偏好回升、油價回檔、美股四大指數強彈。台股週二摜破季線，3月月K線以黑K作收，終結連續三個月上漲格局，在美伊雙方釋出停戰消息，台股今日可望出現強彈收復季線。惟中東戰事消息每日詭譎多變，在雙方未正式撤兵前，仍須提防行情波動。中長線佈局者仍建議嚴控持股比例，長線追蹤族群：台積電及先進製程/封裝相關、高速傳輸(含光傳輸)、載板與PCB、電源管理、散熱、衛星航太、散裝及高殖利率概念等族群。

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 【盤前焦點】台指期夜盤飆1130點　台股拚強彈收復季線
news.Content:
（中央社記者鍾榮峰台北2026年04月1日電）伊朗表示擁有必要意志結束戰爭，尋求保證衝突不重演，消息激勵美股反彈，道瓊工業指數飆漲逾1100點，費城半導體指數勁揚6.24%，台積電ADR強彈6.78%，台指期夜盤大漲1130點收33084點，台積電期貨夜盤上漲70點收1845點。

法人指出，美國和伊朗釋出戰爭可能結束的和緩訊號，激勵美股強彈，台指期夜盤大漲1130點，台股今天有機會反彈，收復季線約32182點可期，挑戰33000點關卡，後續需觀察以色列是否再推進對伊朗軍事行動、伊朗革命衛隊動向，以及美軍後續措施。

伊朗總統裴澤斯基安（Masoud Pezeshkian）表示，德黑蘭擁有「必要的意志」結束與美國和以色列之間這場戰爭，同時尋求這場衝突不會重演的保障機制。

美國總統川普指出，與伊朗戰爭可能很快將結束，其他國家可在沒有美軍協助下，讓荷莫茲海峽（Straitof Hormuz）重新開放。

伊朗革命衛隊表示，若再有伊朗領導人在「針對性暗殺行動」中喪命，將鎖定美國大型科技公司為攻擊目標，包括蘋果（Apple）、輝達（NVIDIA）與Meta等。

市場解讀美伊戰事可望結束，美股4大指數強彈，道瓊工業指數飆漲1125.37點或2.49%，收46341.51點，標普500指數上揚184.80點或2.91%，收6528.52點。

那斯達克指數大漲795.99點或3.83%，收21590.63點，費城半導體指數勁揚445.86點或6.24%，收7588.20點。

人工智慧AI晶片大廠輝達（NVIDIA）漲5.59%收174.4美元，台積電美國存託憑證（ADR）強彈6.78%收337.95美元，美光（Micron）勁揚4.98%收337.84美元。

台股加權指數3月31日下跌795.17點，是台股史上第12大單日跌點，收31722.99點，跌破季線，失守32000點整數關卡，成交值新台幣7939.64億元。在台指期淨部位方面，三大法人淨多單增加673口至1061口，其中外資淨空單減少68口至3萬7214口。

三大法人3月31日合計賣超台股986.64億元，其中外資及陸資賣超807.45億元，是歷史第13大賣超。

根據統計，外資3月單月累計賣超台股達9682.13億元，創史上外資最大單月賣超金額，遠遠超越2025年3月的4656.22億元。

news.Title: AI Data Centers Are Choking on Memory: Is Micron a Buy After Its Monster Run?
news.Content:
Shares of Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) have soared over the past year due to a shortage of high-performance memory for data centers. The company could see strong financial performance over the next few years, as demand remains well above supply.

The key question investors need to answer before buying Micron today is whether this cycle is different. Will artificial intelligence (AI)-driven demand bring an end to the industry's boom-and-bust cycles in memory pricing, or will prices eventually tumble again, as they have in past cycles? One scenario could drive sizable gains over the next few years, while the other could lead to another drawdown in the share price.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Micron's latest earnings report offers clues that can help investors decide whether the stock is worth buying at today's price.

AI-driven growth

In the recent quarter, Micron's revenue tripled year over year to nearly $24 billion. Higher memory prices are juicing margins, sending earnings per share up from $1.41 in the year-ago quarter to $12.07.

AI computing systems, including graphics processing units (GPUs), require advanced memory to handle massive amounts of data -- and right now, the industry can't make enough of it. Management noted on the earnings call that it continues to fulfill only about half to two-thirds of customer demand.

The good news for investors is that the tight supply doesn't appear to be easing anytime soon. Management expects the shortage to persist through the end of 2026 and into next year, which should support higher earnings.

Importantly, demand is coming from other markets beyond data centers. As consumer devices, like smartphones, use on-device AI processing, demand for memory will grow even further. Micron executives specifically called out the opportunity in humanoid robots, which they believe will require memory and storage capacities similar to those of a self-driving car.

Weighing the risks

AI is a powerful demand driver, but it still doesn't eliminate this industry's cyclical risk. Micron and its competitors will chase demand by adding capacity, which could eventually lead to oversupply and lower memory prices.

That additional supply should help Micron over the next couple of years, given how tight the market is. Analysts see earnings climbing to $58 per share in fiscal 2026 (ending in August) and $98 in fiscal 2027, then slipping to $77 in fiscal 2028 -- a sign that pricing could turn cyclical again as supply catches up.

Story Continues

Because long-term earnings are so uncertain, this isn't a stock I'd want to buy and hold indefinitely, even if it has room to run in the next year or so. Micron averaged a forward price-to-earnings multiple of 8.3 over the past year, and now trades at 6.2 times this year's estimate and 3.6 times next year's.

Those low earnings multiples suggest that investors don't view AI demand as a permanent stabilizer for memory pricing. Shares could still climb on today's shortages, but they could also drop sharply if the industry overbuilds manufacturing capacity. Investors who buy Micron stock should size their positions accordingly to account for volatility.

news.Title: Should You Buy Palantir Stock While the Pentagon Is Increasing Spending?
news.Content:
Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) has emerged as a major beneficiary of rising U.S. defense spending. However, investors need to assess this opportunity in the context of the company's valuation. Congress has already approved a $901 billion U.S. military budget for 2026. Additionally, the Pentagon is seeking around $200 billion in supplemental funding amid the ongoing Iran conflict.

Importantly, the Pentagon plans to allocate over $153 billion toward modernization initiatives in 2026, including new ships, artificial intelligence (AI) technologies, and advanced weapons. This shift in spending directly benefits data analytics and enterprise AI player Palantir .

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Government spending is becoming software-driven

The Pentagon plans to adopt Palantir's Maven AI system as a "program of record," effectively making it a core military platform with stable, long-term funding visibility. That designation can help reduce revenue volatility for the company's government business.

Palantir's government business is already gaining momentum. U.S. government revenue soared 55% year over year to roughly $1.8 billion in 2025, reflecting expanding deployments across defense programs. The company's Gotham and Maven platforms are increasingly embedded in real-time decision-making across battlefield data and target identification. Hence, these deployments are highly sticky and difficult to replace with competitor systems.

Palantir's Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP) and proprietary ontology framework (which relates an organization's physical assets to digital counterparts) are also driving strong traction in the commercial segment. In fiscal 2025, U.S. commercial revenue soared 109% year over year to around $1.4 billion.

Palantir also reported $4.3 billion in total contract value in the fourth quarter, up 138% year over year. The company's top 20 customers noted a 45% year-over-year increase in trailing-12-month revenue to $94 million in the fourth quarter. This highlights increasing success in cross-selling and upselling strategies.

Despite these strengths, Palantir's high valuation remains a concern. The company trades at over 77 times forward earnings, leaving limited room for execution missteps.

Hence, although Palantir remains well-positioned to benefit from the Pentagon's increased spending, long-term investors should adopt a disciplined approach and gradually build positions during pullbacks rather than buying aggressively at elevated levels.

Story Continues

news.Title: Microsoft, Chevron and Engine No. 1 sign exclusive deal for power supply
news.Content:
March 31 (Reuters) - Microsoft ( MSFT ), Chevron ( CVX ) and investment fund Engine No. 1 have entered into an exclusivity agreement ‌for power generation and supply, the three companies ‌said on Tuesday.

Technology companies, including Microsoft, are rushing to secure electricity supply ​for their rapidly expanding data centers that would power generative artificial intelligence services such as ChatGPT and Copilot.

"No commercial terms have been finalized, and there is no definitive agreement ‌at this time," the ⁠three companies said in a statement.

Chevron and Engine No. 1 had already announced a partnership ⁠last year to build natural gas-based power plants next to data centers in the U.S., with the two planning ​to use ​turbines by electric services company ​GE Vernova.

Bloomberg News, which ‌has reported the deal with Microsoft, said the long-term agreement is tied to a proposed natural gas-fired power plant in West Texas, with a projected cost of roughly $7 billion.

More from Yahoo Scout

Why are tech companies securing electricity for data centers?

What is the exclusivity agreement between Microsoft and Chevron?

How does this relate to Microsoft's AI infrastructure needs?

What are the details of the West Texas power plant?

The facility would initially generate 2,500 megawatts of electricity, intended ‌to power a large data center ​campus, Bloomberg said.

Chevron had in ​November said its first ​project to power an AI data center ‌using natural gas will be ​built in West ​Texas with the goal of start-up by 2027.

Microsoft has agreed to rent a data center project in Texas ​that was ‌originally being developed for Oracle and OpenAI , Bloomberg News ​reported last week.

(Reporting by Juby Babu in Mexico ​City; Editing by Leroy Leo)

news.Title: Why Marvell Stock Jumped Today
news.Content:
Shares of Marvell Technology (NASDAQ: MRVL) surged on Tuesday after the data solutions provider formed a strategic partnership with Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) .

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Accelerating AI connectivity

The two tech leaders will work together to advance the artificial intelligence ( AI ) boom. Marvell will supply custom processors and networking technology that integrates seamlessly with Nvidia's AI computing platform.

Marvell's chips can be customized by cloud-computing network operators and other high-performance computing providers to speed up AI workloads.

"The world is racing to build AI factories," Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said. "Together with Marvell, we are enabling customers to leverage Nvidia's AI infrastructure ecosystem and scale to build specialized AI compute."

Marvell and Nvidia will also co-develop silicon photonics technology, which uses light to transmit data faster and more efficiently.

Marvell acquired Celestial AI -- a pioneer in high-bandwidth, power-efficient photonics connectivity solutions -- for $3.25 billion in cash and stock in December.

"Our expanded partnership with Nvidia reflects the growing importance of high-speed connectivity, optical interconnect, and accelerated infrastructure in scaling AI," Marvell CEO Matt Murphy said.

Nvidia's cash should spur Marvell's expansion

As part of the deal, Nvidia will invest $2 billion in Marvell. Murphy intends to use the funds to meet the booming demand for Marvell's AI-focused products.

"This just helps turbocharge our growth and our opportunity," Murphy said during an interview with CNBC.

news.Title: Warren Buffett Made a $19.8 Billion Bet and It's Not on AI
news.Content:
In his last quarter as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKB) , legendary investor Warren Buffett made one very large buy.

But he didn't buy shares of his largest position Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) , or his longtime holding Bank of America (NYSE: BAC) , or one of his other artificial intelligence (AI) picks , Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) . In fact, he sold more that 7 million shares of each of those.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

And instead of putting the money into another AI company, he picked up more than 8 million shares of a different company in one of his longtime favorite industries: oil. Here's how Buffett made one of his last plays into one of his best.

Buffett's bad buy?

Buffett's surprise investment was in oil major Chevron (NYSE: CVX) . He spent more than $1 billion to bring Berkshire Hathaway's total position in Chevron up to $19.8 billion.

This was a bold move for Buffett, because even though he's no stranger to investments in oil and gas companies, Chevron's share price lagged the performance of the S&P 500 by more than 10% in 2025, so it wasn't looking like a surefire winner. But Buffett likes a bargain, so he picked up shares for an average price of about $132 a share.

Buffett's brilliant buy

Of course, even the "Oracle of Omaha" couldn't have known in late 2025 what was on the horizon in the oil and gas industry in 2026, but the timing certainly seems to have worked out for him.

First, the capture of Venezuelan president Nicolas Maduro in January may have opened up new long-term opportunities in Venezuela for Chevron. Most oil producers aren't expecting much of an impact on their finances, considering they have no current operations in Venezuela and no plans to begin any. Chevron, though, is the exception, as the lone U.S. oil major actively drilling for oil in the country. Of course, the situation in Venezuela is still new and unpredictable, but if any company were to benefit, it would be Chevron.

What's really caused Chevron's stock to rise, though, are the skyrocketing global energy prices due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz by Iran. With crude oil prices soaring, Chevron's stock price is now up 37% year to date, at $209 per share. That handily beats the S&P 500, which is down 4.8% so far in 2026:

That means Berkshire has already seen a 58% return on its latest Chevron investment... in less than six months. It's one final masterstroke by a master investor: a bold Buffett move that paid off, and will likely continue to pay dividends (both literally and figuratively) in years to come.

Story Continues

news.Title: 《美股》伊朗透露停戰談判意願 台積ADR/費半衝
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-04-01 07:03:24 郭妍希 發佈

伊朗領導層對停戰談判展現開放態度、為開戰以來頭一遭，再加上市場謠傳美國總統川普(Donald Trump)對幕僚透露就算未能重啟荷姆茲海峽、也想要提前終止戰爭，美國四大指數31日全面衝高。

道瓊工業平均指數3月31日終場上漲2.49%(1,125.37點)、收46,341.51點；月K線下跌5.38%，結束連續10個月的漲勢。那斯達克指數上漲3.83%(795.99點)、收21,590.63點；月K線下跌4.75%。標準普爾500指數上漲2.91%(184.8點)、收6,528.52點；月K線下跌5.09%，寫下自2022年以來最慘單月跌幅。費城半導體指數上漲6.24%(445.86點)、收7,588.20點；月K線下跌6.3%。

伊朗官媒IRNA報導，總統佩澤希齊揚(Masoud Pezeshkian)週一(30日)對歐盟高峰會主席科斯塔(António Costa)表示，伊朗「必須結束這場戰爭」，但期望獲取某種保證作為交換。他說，中東若要停戰，則「伊朗人民的安全與利益必須獲得保障」。

在先前 公開提出 的要求中，伊朗要求繼續行使對荷姆茲海峽的主權，該政權已開始對通過的船隻徵收昂貴的「安全通行費」；此外，伊朗還要求戰爭賠償金及其他終戰條件。

據CNN報導，美國國務卿魯比歐(Marco Rubio)在法國結束G7會議後發表評論，痛批這些通行費「不可接受」且「對世界造成危險」。

華盛頓方面，川普曾多次威脅要以武力重新開放海峽。然而，週二上午，川普似乎準備好要削減軍事行動。他在社交平台Truth Social上 發文稱 ，「伊朗基本上已被摧毀，最難的部分完成了。」

他並表示，針對那些當初拒絕參與對伊朗的「斬首行動」(decapitation)、之後因荷姆茲海峽封鎖而拿不到航空燃油的國家(例如英國)，我有個建議給你們：第一，跟美國買，我們的油多得是。第二，拿出點遲到的勇氣，自己去荷姆茲海峽把它「拿回來」。

川普表示，「你們必須開始學習如何為自己而戰。美國不會在那裡幫你們了，就像當初我們需要時，你們也沒挺我們一樣。」

川普週二上午還告訴紐約郵報(New York Post)，說這場戰爭「不會持續太久」，且在美軍撤出後，海峽會「自動」開放。

華爾街日報30日引述未具名政府官員 報導 ，川普告訴幕僚，即使荷莫茲海峽仍維持大致封閉的狀態，他也願意結束美國對伊朗的軍事行動。此舉可能使德黑蘭持續掌控該水道，並將重啟海峽的複雜任務留待日後處理。

美國國防部長赫格塞斯(Pete Hegseth) 31日表示，接下來幾日對伊朗戰爭有決定性的影響。他並警告德黑蘭，若未能跟美方達成協議，則衝突會再次加劇。

西德州中級(WTI)原油期貨31日終場下跌1.46%、收每桶101.38美元。不過，市場謠傳伊朗在杜拜水域襲擊了一艘科威特油輪，仍帶動布蘭特原油期貨跳漲4.94%、收118.35美元，創2022年6月16日以來收盤新高。

自伊朗戰爭爆發以來便持續面臨壓力的科技類股應聲強彈。SPDR科技類股ETF (Technology Select Sector SPDR Fund，代號為XLK)、輝達(Nvidia Corp.)、台積電(2330) ADR分別勁揚4.24%、5.59%、6.78%。

個股變化方面，網通IC設計大廠邁威爾科技(Marvell Technology, Inc.)喜獲輝達(Nvidia Corp.)投資20億美元，雙方還將攜手開發矽光子技術與AI基礎建設，股價應聲飆漲12.8%、收99.05美元，漲幅居費半30支成分股之冠。

其他光通訊概念股同步反彈。輝達(Nvidia Corp.)矽光子共同封裝光學(CPO)供應夥伴Coherent Corp.、光學與商用雷射元件供應商Lumentum、全球最大磷化銦(InP)基板供應商AXT Inc.分別勁揚8.45%、7.33%、8.06%。

(圖片來源：shutterstock)

news.AI_Summary:

• Splits can also affect dividends per share and provide flexibility for employee stock options and buybacks.

news.Title: 主動台股ETF打敗大盤 專家：市場短線波動 可留意低接機會
news.Content: 台股3月下挫3,643點，修正幅度達10.42%，不過；採取主動選股策略的主動台股ETF表現都優於大盤指數，其中，有四檔主動式台股ETF跌幅在3%以內，包括：主動統一台股增 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 儘管3月台股指數下挫10.42%，但主動式台股ETF表現優於大盤，其中統一台股增長、台新優勢成長及第一金台股優等ETF今年第一季漲幅達13%-17%。
• 專家指出，科技產業持續推動投資週期，雲端服務公司加碼AI基礎設施，預計今年美國四大CSP資本支出將達6,176億美元，年增約六成，台灣電子產業在高階晶片、伺服器等供應鏈具優勢。
• 預期至2027年前，台灣電子業將持續受惠雲端資本支出循環，營運能見度高、獲利動能強；AI強勁需求延續，預估今、明年台股企業獲利分別成長三成及兩成。
• 專家認為，台股指數短期修正幅度較大，但市場對算力需求不變，美伊戰爭帶來的波動反而提供低接機會；歷史數據顯示，台股大跌後長期而言多數轉為正報酬。
news.Keywords: 主動ETF,AI基礎設施,雲端支出,獲利成長,逢低接

news.Content:

總計3月寫下史上最大 ...

news.Title: Nvidia’s $2 billion bet reveals its next big target
news.Content: Nvidia ( NVDA ) started as a video game chipmaker, but became so much more thanks to smart investments. Today, along with GPUs, it makes CPUs, networking equipment, and AI inference accelerators. According to the company’s 10-K form , in fiscal year 2026, its networking revenue totaled $31.4 billion. That was a pretty big jump from $13 billion in 2025. The form states: “Revenue from Data Center networking grew 142%, driven by the introduction and continued ramp of NVLink compute fabric for GB200 and GB300 systems and the growth of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia invested $2 billion in Lumentum Holdings (LITE) and Coherent Corp. (COHR), both networking companies focused on silicon photonics.
• Nvidia's networking revenue totaled $31.4 billion in fiscal year 2026, a significant jump from $13 billion in 2025.
• Nvidia is strengthening its position in silicon photonics through partnerships and investments to compete with Broadcom.
• Nvidia also partnered with Marvell Technology (MRVL), investing $2 billion and integrating Marvell's custom AI accelerators into Nvidia's NVLink Fusion platform.
news.Keywords: silicon photonics, networking, investment, strategic partnership, AI infrastructure

news.Title: OpenAI valued at $852 billion in latest funding round ahead of IPO

In a statement , OpenAI said it is now generating $2 billion in revenue per month, up from $1 billion per quarter in 2024, ...
news.AI_Summary:

• OpenAI is generating $2 billion in revenue per month, growing four times faster than Google parent Alphabet and Meta.
• The funding round was led by Amazon ($50B), Nvidia ($30B), and SoftBank ($30B), with participation from Microsoft.
• The capital will fund OpenAI's data-center buildout, estimated at $600 billion by 2030.

• 根據證交所統計，上週（3/23~3/27）外資在集中市場賣超1,030.30億元。
• 自年初至3月27日止，外資累計賣超為6,888.15億元，總持有股票市值較3月20日減少6,228.14億元。
• 上週外資賣超前三名為力積電（賣超184,542千股）、友達（賣超112,339千股）、台新新光金（賣超108,953千股）。
• 上週外資買超前三名為華通（買超55,520千股）、長榮航（買超44,815千股）、大聯大（買超33,630千股）。
news.Keywords: 外資賣超,資金撤退,持股市值減少,個股賣超,個股買超

news.Title: 外資殺瘋 台股3月爆六大黑歷史
news.Content: 台股修正壓力未歇，3月上演跳水秀，苦寫六大黑歷史，包括月線重挫3,691點，寫史上最大跌點，終止連三紅，且單月成交量爆出17.96兆元新高，外資賣超9,682.13億元最多，上市櫃市值單月蒸發12.14兆元，股民單月平均虧87.0 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股3月修正壓力未歇，寫下月線重挫3,691點（史上最大跌點）、外資賣超9,682.13億元（單月最多）、上市櫃市值蒸發12.14兆元等六大黑歷史。
• 外資3月大舉提款9,682億元，創單月新高，有「殺瘋了」跡象；自營商3月賣超2,235.77億元，創史上單月最多。
• 三大法人合計3月拋售1.09兆元，為台股史上首度單月賣超破兆元紀錄；八大公股行庫3月買超2,211.11億元護盤，寫下單月買超最多。
• 專家預期4月調節壓力將緩解，基本面強勁帶動下，有機會穩住市場信心；AI、半導體等長期趨勢未變，短線震盪有助籌碼沉澱與估值修正。
news.Keywords: 台股修正,外資賣超,史上紀錄,公股護盤,AI趨勢

news.Title: 主動台股ETF 買氣熱
news.Content: 儘管市場動盪，但AI趨動的科技股浪潮推波助瀾下，今年2月台灣人持有基 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受AI趨動的科技股浪潮推波助瀾，今年2月台灣人持有基金規模再攀新高，來到17兆5,859億元，月增逾6,500億元。
• 整體境內境外基金買氣呈現淨流入。
• 其中，主動式台股ETF基金規模與增幅表現更為吸睛，到2026年2月底，規模達1,871億元，月增幅21.24％。
• 今年以來獲准或申報生效的基金中，七檔為主動式ETF基金，涵蓋美國科技、台股、高息和全球市場等類型。
news.Keywords: 基金規模,主動式ETF,AI科技股,淨流入,資產配置

news.Title: 11檔台股ETF 受益人暴增
news.Content: 今年以來台股走勢呈現高檔震盪、結構分化格局。在AI產業持續擴張與半導體供應鏈接單動能強勁帶動下，加權指數一度挑戰歷史高點，電子族群仍為盤面主軸，但隨著國際資金調節、主要央行政策反覆，以及 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 今年以來台股高檔震盪，儘管國際資金調節、地緣政治風險升溫，市場波動加劇，但ETF受益人數變化顯示資金逢震盪進場趨勢明確。
• 第一季共有11檔台股ETF受益人數增加逾萬人，以市值型與科技型ETF最受青睞，如元大台灣50（0050）、富邦科技（0052）、群益台灣精選高息（00919）、國泰台灣科技龍頭（00881）。
• 富邦科技ETF（0052）受益人數單季大幅增加逾17萬人，成長率達65.5％，反映市場對科技與AI題材的高度認同。
• 專家認為，AI產業發展方向明確，未來兩至三年AI資本支出維持高度成長已形成共識，台灣半導體供應鏈可望持續受惠。
news.Keywords: ETF受益人數,市值型ETF,科技型ETF,AI供應鏈,逢低布局

news.Title: 輝達Rubin改版不減量 台積接單穩
news.Content: 輝達（NVIDIA）新一代AI GPU「Rubin Ultra」傳出因量產與封裝難度考量，設計可能由市場預期的4顆GPU晶粒下修至2顆。供應鏈指出，目前晶圓 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達新一代AI GPU「Rubin Ultra」傳出因量產與封裝難度考量，設計可能由4顆GPU晶粒下修至2顆。
• 供應鏈指出，目前晶圓代工端規劃以雙晶粒（2-die）版本為主，但並未影響台積電整體投片規模，AI晶片需求仍維持強勁。
• 業者指出，Rubin投片節奏調整，輝達提高Blackwell世代投片比重，此變動反映產品架構優化與產能配置調整，對台積電營運影響有限。
• 業界分析，雙晶粒方案有助提升封裝成功率，並釋放部分產能轉供其他AI GPU或ASIC客戶，有利於台積電維持高稼動率。
news.Keywords: 輝達GPU,Rubin Ultra,台積電,投片規模,先進製程

news.Title: 台積電COUPE 預計今年量產
news.Content:
AI資料中心對高速互連需求爆發，矽光子技術邁入商轉關鍵期。SEMI國際半導體產業協會31日透過旗下矽光子產業聯盟 SiPhIA舉辦論壇，聚焦量產挑戰。

台積電指出，旗下 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI資料中心對高速互連需求爆發，矽光子技術邁入商轉關鍵期，台積電旗下矽光子整合平台COUPE預計今年進入量產。
• 台積電COUPE平台透過SoIC技術將電子積體電路與光子積體電路進行異質整合堆疊，可大幅縮短訊號傳輸距離並降低功耗。
• SEMI引用產業數據預測，2026年矽光子模組在光收發器市場占比將突破五成，顯示光互連技術已由前瞻研發走向主流部署。
• 業界分析，台灣廠有機會從晶圓製造延伸至光電整合與測試驗證，提升整體供應鏈價值。
news.Keywords: 矽光子,COUPE平台,SoIC技術,高速互連,資料中心

news.Title: 獲利、績效紅不讓 台積電、緯穎創佳績
news.Content: 上市櫃公司去年度財報全數出爐，「護國神山」台積電（2330）再創佳績，再度同時拿下去年獲利王與現金王；績效王則由緯穎（6669）奪得，打敗蟬聯多年的大立光 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電去年全年稅後純益以1兆7,178億元、年增46％穩居獲利王；緯穎以全年EPS 275.06元奪得績效王。
• 受惠AI與先進製程需求強勁，台積電去年第四季合併營收首度突破兆元大關，全年EPS攀升至66.25元新高。
• 儘管基本面亮眼，台積電仍受中東戰事影響，股價跌破季線至1,760元；本土投顧維持樂觀看法，上調今年EPS預估至100元，目標價看至3,000元。
• 台積電去年現金及約當現金2.76兆元再度衛冕現金王；鴻海去年第四季營收創歷史新高，但獲利略低於預期。
news.Keywords: 獲利王,現金王,績效王,AI需求,先進製程

news.Title: 算力需求爆發 Foundry 2.0加速 台積市占續揚
news.Content: AI算力需求持續爆發，帶動全球半導體製造鏈全面升溫。研調機構IDC最新報告指出，在生成式AI與代理式AI（Agentic AI）應用推動下，推理端算力需求快速擴張，「Fo ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AI算力需求持續爆發，IDC預估2026年廣義晶圓代工2.0市場規模將突破3,600億美元，年增17%，台積電今年市占率有望進一步推升至44%。
• IDC資深研究經理分析，2026年半導體製造產業進入AI主導的穩健擴張週期，先進製程與先進封裝持續供不應求。
• 台積電持續擴充3奈米與2奈米產能，並放大CoWoS先進封裝產出，透過先進製程與封裝整合能力，成為AI算力供應鏈核心樞紐。
• 三星方面，隨SF2製程良率改善，營運動能亦見改善；英特爾製程進度加速，18A製程邁入量產，積極爭取外部客戶。
news.Keywords: AI算力,Foundry 2.0,晶圓代工,市占率,先進製程

news.Title: 15悍將EPS雙飆高 投信卡位
news.Content: 上市櫃公司去（2025）年獲利踩油門，衝上4.51兆元新高，個股中去年第四季及全年每股稅後純益（EPS）雙寫歷史新高約有66檔，進一步篩選投信3月買盤卡位 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 去年第四季及全年每股稅後純益（EPS）雙寫歷史新高的約有66檔個股，其中投信3月買盤著墨15檔，包含台積電、奇鋐、健策、旺矽等。
• 這15檔個股主要聚焦在AI股及記憶體股，都是未來長線趨勢股，今年獲利仍有機會持續向上。
• 美國四大雲端服務供應商（CSP）廠今年資本支出預計較去年成長6成，AI訂單能見度高。
• 專家認為，若美伊戰事和緩，股價跌勢不小的AI及相關個股有機會優先受到資金青睞。
news.Keywords: EPS創高股,投信買盤,AI股,記憶體股,CSP支出

news.Title: 多頭總司令張錫：台積1,800元以下閉眼買
news.Content: 中東戰事不休，台股31日失守32,000點，台積電也跌破季線收1,760元。有「多頭總司令」之稱的東海大學財金系客座教授張錫指出，台積電今年有望到2,500元、明年上看3 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 「多頭總司令」張錫認為，台積電今年有望到2,500元、明年上看3,000元，預估明年EPS 120元，以25倍本益比來看，股價3字頭合理。
• 張錫認為，儘管美伊戰爭短線紛擾，但台灣基本面不錯，AI剛性需求強勁，台積電跌到1,800元以下可閉眼買。
• 他指出，台灣科技業已能創造價值，毛利拉高，本益比自然也拉高，AI時代資金更高度集中在具成長性的龍頭公司。
• 張錫認為，台灣在台積電主導下，具備矽光子（CPO）供應鏈優勢，未來可能出現亞太區整合情境。
news.Keywords: 台積電目標價,AI需求,矽光子,本益比,龍頭股

news.Title: Why Palantir's New Program of Record With the Pentagon Could Be a Game Changer
news.Content: In early March, Deputy Secretary of Defense Steve Feinberg designated the Maven Smart System (MSS) from Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) as a formal program of record . This move will transition the platform from niche, experimental use cases into a standardized, long-term fixture in U.S. military operations. For Palantir, this move by the Pentagon ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir Technologies' (PLTR) Maven Smart System (MSS) has been designated a formal program of record by the Pentagon.
• This move standardizes MSS for U.S. military operations, securing multiyear funding for Palantir.
• The MSS program has scaled rapidly, with a five-year contract for the U.S. Army worth up to $1.3 billion.
• This endorsement validates Palantir's ontology platform and is expected to supercharge its government segment as AI adoption accelerates.
news.Keywords: defense, AI, program of record, government contract, revenue visibility

news.Title: Why Did Nvidia Stock Pop Today?
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) stock outpaced the market today after the company announced yet another move to expand its artificial intelligence (AI) ecosystem. While the overall market, especially the tech ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) stock rose 5.3% after announcing a $2 billion investment in Marvell Technology (MRVL) and a strategic partnership.
• The partnership integrates Marvell into Nvidia's NVLink Fusion rack-scale AI infrastructure platform.
• Nvidia is making similar $2 billion investments in other AI supply chain companies like Coherent and Lumentum Holdings.
• CEO Jensen Huang stated the partnership enables customers to leverage Nvidia's AI ecosystem to build specialized AI compute.
news.Keywords: AI ecosystem, strategic partnership, investment, NVLink Fusion, data center

news.Title: Wall Street Overlooked This Industrial Stock. Down 14%, It's Now a Forever Buy.
news.Content: Helped in part by renewed enthusiasm for defense stocks and increasing intersections with technology, including artificial intelligence (AI), the industrial sector isn't as stodgy as it used to be. Admittedly, that's painting in broad strokes, and there are some things for investors to keep in mind about this group. The S&P 500 Industrials Sector ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Illinois Tool Works (ITW) is considered a potential long-term investment due to its adaptability and wide economic moat.
• The stock has pulled back 14.6% from its 52-week high, presenting a potential buying opportunity.
• ITW demonstrates superiority over rivals in automotive manufacturing and food equipment segments, indicating customer loyalty.
• The company has a 62-year dividend increase streak and consistently buys back its own shares.
news.Keywords: industrial sector, economic moat, dividend, share buyback, long-term investment

news.Title: Slow 2026 Starts Present Opportunities: AAPL, NVDA
news.Content: It’s no secret that stocks have been volatile over recent weeks, mostly fueled by geopolitical concerns. Tech stocks have been hit pretty hard, with investors likely cashing in some gains on the back of uncertainty following big runs over recent years. But weakness generally presents nice opportunities for investors, especially among stocks enjoying positive earnings estimate revisions like NVIDIA NVDA and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• NVIDIA (NVDA) and Apple (AAPL) have had a slow start to 2026 but show positive earnings estimate revisions.
• Nvidia reported record sales of $68.1 billion (up 73% YoY) and adjusted EPS of $1.62 (up 82% YoY), with Data Center sales up 75% YoY.
• Apple reported record revenue of $143.8 billion (up 16% YoY) and adjusted EPS of $2.84 (up 19% YoY), with iPhone sales at $85.3 billion.
• Both companies remain top-tier investments due to robust cash generation and favorable EPS revisions.
news.Keywords: earnings estimates, sales growth, data center, cash generation, AI infrastructure

news.Title: The AI Supercycle Has a New Bottleneck. 1 Growth Stock Is Positioned to Solve It.
news.Content: When most investors think of the artificial intelligence ( AI ) market, they often focus on leading chipmakers like Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) or hyperscalers like Microsoft . However, those AI leaders can't keep expanding without companies like Lumentum (NASDAQ: LITE) providing the optical equipment ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Lumentum (LITE) stock surged nearly 1,000% in the past 12 months as hyperscalers increased networking spending for AI applications.
• Lumentum provides optical networking equipment that addresses bottlenecks in data transfer speeds for AI GPUs.
• Nvidia invested $2 billion in Lumentum and formed a strategic partnership in early March.
• Analysts expect Lumentum's revenue to surge at a 58% CAGR from 2025 to 2028, reaching $6.4 billion.
news.Keywords: AI bottleneck, optical networking, revenue growth, strategic partnership, Nvidia investment

news.Title: Got $10,000? This Is Exactly How I'd Split It Across These 5 AI Stocks Right Now
news.Content: If I had $10,000 to invest right now, I'd split it between these five artificial intelligence (AI) stocks. All of them have pulled back from their highs, but all still look like solid long-term buys. 1. Alphabet (10 shares) The largest stake I'd take would be in Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) : 10 shares would cost me around $2,800 as of this writing. The company is just the complete AI package, as it has ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) is recommended for its complete AI package, including top-tier AI chips and models like Gemini.
• The company's custom AI chips offer cost advantages in model training and inference, with direct sales as a potential growth driver.
• Amazon (AMZN) is seen as undervalued, with accelerating growth in its cloud computing business and a forward P/E below 27.
• ServiceNow (NOW) and Salesforce (CRM) are recommended for their embedded customer workflows and AI solutions, with ServiceNow's NowAssist AI hitting $600M ARR.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, custom chips, cloud computing, SaaS, valuation

news.Title: 台積電命懸一線？ADR驚見半年線　陳威良點名「這族群」是Q2唯一救命草
news.Content:
財經中心／李宜樺報導

台股31日盤勢再現詭譎變化，權王台積電回測季線，尾盤 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股31日盤勢詭譎，權王台積電回測季線，尾盤爆出13812張賣單，引發市場關注。
• 分析師陳威良示警，台積電ADR早已跌破半年線，若台股比照跌幅，補跌壓力恐讓股民心驚。

The index looks at a swath of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) has spiked above 30, indicating investor anxiety.

• Investors with cash on the sidelines may find opportunities as the Nasdaq-100 is in correction territory and the S&P 500 is close behind.

news.Title: Prediction: This Will Be Alphabet's Stock Price in 5 Years
news.Content: Obviously, nobody owns a functioning crystal ball. And as the old adage goes, past performance is no guarantee of future results. Still, with a bit of well-reasoned conjecture, a company's past and present can paint a reasonably good picture of what's likely ahead. To this end, here's my prediction of what Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) stock's price will ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) stock price prediction assumes a trailing-12-month P/E ratio around 25 and a net profit margin of 30%.
• Revenue growth is projected to remain at 15% annually, led by cloud computing but slowed by advertising headwinds.
• Based on these assumptions, Alphabet's revenue could reach $800 billion by 2030, with net income of $240 billion, pushing the stock price to over $500.
• A faster AI adoption or commercial quantum computing offering could potentially drive the stock price closer to $560.
news.Keywords: stock price prediction, P/E ratio, revenue growth, AI, cloud computing

news.Title: Has Salesforce split its stock? CRM's stock split history explained
news.Content: As one of the world’s biggest tech companies, Salesforce ( CRM ) has revolutionized businesses by automating and centralizing their data. Its cloud technology provides businesses with a “360-degree view” of their sales, customer service, and marketing operations, helping them collaborate better, increase productivity, and become more profitable. In 2024, Salesforce introduced “Agentforce,” a suite of AI agents that helps businesses “ work smarter, be more responsive, and build better relationships ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Salesforce has only executed one stock split (4:1 in April 2013) in its history.
• This contrasts with companies like Microsoft (9 splits) and Apple (5 splits).
• Stock splits can make shares more affordable, improve liquidity, and signal management confidence.
• However, a stock split does not fundamentally change a company's value.
news.Keywords: Stock Split History, Shareholder Value, Market Liquidity, Corporate Finance, Valuation Metrics

Related: Google reveals major 2029 quantum threat for digital wallets Understanding quantum threat to cryptocurrency Cryptocurrencies are virtual currencies that rely on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Google warns that quantum computers could crack Bitcoin transactions in approximately nine minutes.

• Google's research suggests fewer qubits are needed to crack cryptocurrency cryptography than previously thought.

news.Title: Trump Tax Law’s Affordable Housing Boost Hits Snag
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- The US government’s largest affordable housing program was supposed to be supercharged by President Donald Trump’s signature tax law. So far, that jolt hasn’t arrived. That’s because, investors and developers say, their efforts to take advantage of the dramatic expansion of the Low-Income Housing Tax Credit have bumped up against some unintended consequences. In particular, the law increased the potential size of any given affordable housing development deal eligible for the credit – but that, in turn, means few banks are able to finance them under the complex rules of the program. “The market has slowed pretty ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The US government's affordable housing program faces challenges due to unintended consequences of a tax law.
• Banks face limitations on financing large affordable housing deals due to caps on 'public welfare investments'.
• Proposed legislation aims to raise these caps, but its passage is uncertain.
• The lack of financing is stalling the development of new affordable housing units.
news.Keywords: Affordable Housing, Tax Credits, Financial Regulations, Housing Development, Investment Caps

Driving innovation and digital transformation by capitalizing on virtualization technology, it has enabled users to access and store data over the Internet without managing physical servers and intricate IT infrastructure. This has facilitated the development of cutting-edge technologies, enabling multiple users to share the same hardware resources by connecting to the cloud platform through a web browser or dedicated applications. This, in turn, has created the framework for seamless omnichannel customer engagement at lower costs. Cloud ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cloud computing firms like Alphabet (GOOGL), Microsoft (MSFT), Amazon (AMZN), and IBM are considered indispensable to investment portfolios.
• Organizations are adopting cloud computing for its pay-per-use model, cost-effectiveness, agility, and scalability.
• Cloud computing provides the infrastructure for AI and machine learning workloads, driving innovation across industries.
• The global cloud computing market size is expected to reach $3,349.6 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 16%.
news.Keywords: cloud computing, AI infrastructure, digital transformation, market growth, investment theme

news.Title: Nvidia's Stock Is Struggling, and That's Bad News for This High-Powered Nasdaq ETF
news.Content: Investing in exchange-traded funds (ETFs) can be a good way to spread out your risk among many different stocks. But one thing you may have noticed is that many ETFs, especially ones with significant positions in tech, often have a lot of exposure to a single stock: Nvidia ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's stock decline is impacting the Invesco QQQ Trust (QQQ) ETF, as Nvidia is its largest holding (nearly 9%).
• The QQQ ETF has shown a strong correlation with Nvidia's stock performance in 2026.
• Tech stocks are generally struggling, but Nvidia's significant weighting amplifies the ETF's volatility.
• Long-term investors may consider holding the ETF despite short-term downturns.
news.Keywords: ETF Correlation, Tech Sector Volatility, Market Downturn, Investment Strategy, Portfolio Holdings

news.Title: Is Microsoft Stock a Value Trap?
news.Content: The definition of a value trap: A highly regarded stock that tumbles, that may look like an obvious buy, but is actually declining due to genuine problems within the business. Most investors regard Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) as a world-class company. Its tech empire is far-reaching, and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft stock has fallen 33% from its all-time highs due to concerns over AI spending, OpenAI dependence, and potential legacy product displacement.
• The stock's P/E ratio has fallen to 23 times trailing-12-month earnings, making it appear more attractive.
• Analysts project 16% annual earnings growth over the next three to five years.
• The company's entrenched enterprise position and robust network effects are seen as key strengths.
news.Keywords: Valuation Adjustment, AI Spending, OpenAI Partnership, Enterprise Software, Network Effects

news.Title: Marvell Technology Soars on Nvidia's $2B Investment. Should You Buy MRVL Stock Here, Too?
news.Content: Marvell Technology (MRVL) shares surged more than 8% this morning after Nvidia (NVDA) announced a $2 billion direct investment in the company alongside a sweeping strategic partnership. The deal integrates Marvell into Nvidia's AI factory and AI-RAN ecosystem through the NVLink Fusion platform, a rack-scale architecture that enables customers to build semi-custom AI infrastructure using Nvidia's NVLink ecosystem. Under the agreement, Marvell will supply custom XPUs and NVLink Fusion-compatible scale-up networking, while Nvidia contributes its Vera CPU, ConnectX NICs, Bluefield DPUs, NVLink ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Marvell Technology (MRVL) shares surged over 10% after Nvidia announced a $2 billion investment and deepened partnership for AI infrastructure.
• Marvell will supply custom XPUs and networking gear for Nvidia's NVLink Fusion platform, integrating it into Nvidia's AI ecosystem.
• The companies will collaborate on silicon photonics technology and telecom applications, aiming to integrate AI into mobile network infrastructure.
• Marvell's acquisition of Celestial AI complements the Nvidia partnership, positioning it in GPU interconnect architecture.
news.Keywords: Nvidia investment, AI infrastructure, partnership, silicon photonics, GPU interconnect

news.Title: Micron stock continues slide, despite massive data center demand
news.Content: Memory chipmaker Micron ( MU ) stock slid in the early trading Tuesday as the memory industry continues to grapple with the fallout from Google’s ( GOOG , GOOGL ) TurboQuant compression algorithm , which claims to improve AI model efficiency. The fear among investors is that more efficient AI will lead to a drop in demand for high-bandwidth memory, a key component in AI data centers that ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron (MU) stock slid due to fallout from Google's TurboQuant compression algorithm, which could reduce memory demand.
• Morgan Stanley analyst Joseph Moore believes memory demand is not decreasing, citing agentic AI's role.
• Micron's Q2 results showed massive year-over-year growth (EPS +682%, revenue +196%).
• Despite recent declines, memory chipmakers are still up significantly year-over-year, facing a global memory shortage.
news.Keywords: Memory Demand, AI Efficiency, Agentic AI, Semiconductor Shortage, Earnings Performance

news.Title: OpenAI Just Pulled the Plug on Sora. Is This AI Stock the Biggest Winner?
news.Content: When the public first got a glimpse of Sora, OpenAI's text-to-video generative AI model, some saw the disruptive potential immediately. Tyler Perry, the blockbuster Hollywood director, said he was pausing an $800 million expansion on his studios in Atlanta. Perry told The Hollywood Reporter back in February 2024, "All of that is currently and indefinitely on hold because of Sora and what I'm seeing. I had gotten word over the last year or so that this was coming, but I had no idea until I saw recently the demonstrations of what ...
news.AI_Summary:
• OpenAI is retiring its Sora text-to-video generative AI model due to high costs and lack of product-market fit.
• The decision reflects cost rationalization and reallocation of spending to more promising areas.
• Sora reportedly cost $15 million a day to run and generated minimal revenue.
• The move signals potential struggles for OpenAI amidst competition from Anthropic and Google's Gemini.
news.Keywords: Generative AI, AI Model Retirement, Cost Rationalization, Product-Market Fit, Competitive Landscape

news.Title: CoreWeave Stock: Beware of the Threat Lurking
news.Content: Rapid growth will get investors excited for a stock, and CoreWeave (NASDAQ: CRWV) delivers growth in spades. news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: Will TSM's Advanced Packaging Push Unlock a New Growth Phase?
news.Content: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company TSM, also known as TSMC, is expanding beyond wafer fabrication by investing heavily in advanced packaging technology. This segment is becoming critical as AI and high-performance computing chips require more complex integration. Technologies like 3D stacking and chiplet-based designs help improve performance and reduce power usage, making advanced packaging a key ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) is investing heavily in advanced packaging technology, which accounted for 8% of revenues in 2025 and is expected to exceed 10% in 2026.
• AI demand is a key driver, requiring tight integration between components facilitated by advanced packaging.
• TSMC is allocating up to 20% of its $52-$56 billion capex in 2026 to packaging and related technologies.
• The company forecasts approximately 30% sales growth in 2026, with advanced packaging expected to be a meaningful growth driver.
news.Keywords: Advanced Packaging, AI Demand, Semiconductor Manufacturing, Capital Expenditure, Revenue Growth

news.Title: Unlocking Intrinsic Value: Analysis of Meta Platforms Inc
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . In this article, we will take a look into Meta Platforms Inc's ( NASDAQ:META ) DCF analysis, a reliable and data-driven approach to estimating its intrinsic value. Instead of using future free cash flow as in the traditional DCF model, the GuruFocus DCF calculator uses EPS without NRI as the default for the DCF model based on research that shows that historically stock prices have been more correlated with earnings than free cash ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms Inc.'s intrinsic value, calculated by GuruFocus's DCF model, is estimated at $730.56, suggesting it is modestly undervalued at its current trading price of $536.38.
• The DCF model uses EPS without NRI and a two-stage growth approach, with a 10-year growth stage at 22.70% and a terminal stage at 4%.
• A traditional DCF model based on free cash flow estimates the intrinsic value at $560.10, indicating fair valuation with a 4.23% margin of safety.
• The model's accuracy depends on various assumptions and projections about future earnings potential and growth rates.
news.Keywords: DCF Analysis, Intrinsic Value, Valuation Model, Margin of Safety, Financial Projections

news.Title: Trump’s Tax Cut Delivers at Least $65 Billion Windfall to Corporations
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Some of the country’s wealthiest corporations are calculating they owe far less to the Internal Revenue Service as a result of President Donald Trump’s overhauled tax code, underscoring how a law billed as a middle‑class cut also turned out to be a big win for Corporate America. Nearly a dozen of the 50 biggest US-listed companies attributed a drop in federal cash income taxes last year as a direct result of Trump’s $3.4 trillion sweeping tax law, according to a Bloomberg analysis of regulatory filings. In all, annual corporate tax revenues dropped by $65 billion following the law’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon.com Inc. saw a significant drop in federal cash income taxes in 2025, owing $2.8 billion down from over $7 billion in prior years.
• The company attributes this decrease to Trump's tax law, which it expects to continue reducing cash taxes in 2026.
• The tax law provided benefits across various sectors, including Big Tech, retailers, and manufacturers, through deductions and special preferences.
• Corporate tax revenues dropped by $65 billion annually following the law's passage.
news.Keywords: Tax Law Impact, Corporate Taxes, Tax Reduction, Regulatory Filings, Fiscal Policy

news.Title: This Unstoppable Vanguard ETF Is Beating the S&P 500, the Nasdaq-100, and the Dow Jones in 2026
news.Content: The U.S. stock market is off to a difficult start to 2026. Ongoing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East have sent the price of oil soaring, which is creating economic instability and clouding the earnings picture for corporate America. As a result, the S&P 500 , the Nasdaq-100 , and the Dow Jones Industrial Average have each suffered year-to-date declines of more than 5% so far. However, another index is bucking the losses to trade flat for the year. The Russell 2000 is home to approximately 2,000 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Vanguard Russell 2000 ETF (VTWO) is trading flat for the year, outperforming the S&P 500, Nasdaq-100, and Dow Jones.
• Small-cap stocks in the Russell 2000 are more insulated from global conflicts due to their domestic focus.
• The ETF's diversification and low weighting of top holdings (5.6%) contribute to steadier returns compared to concentrated indexes.
• Companies like Bloom Energy and Credo Technology within the ETF have shown significant stock price appreciation due to strong demand in their respective sectors.
news.Keywords: Small-Cap Stocks, ETF Performance, Diversification, Market Insulation, Sector Demand
